name: =?utf-8?Q?Caleb=20Heimlich?=
subject: Happy New Year!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Washington State Republican Party
body:
Help us with a strong start in this new two-year election cycle! | | |
---
| | [ ](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=8cb9176280&e=6a281f566d)
---
| |
---
| Peter,

**Happy New Year from the Washington State Republican Party!**

This past year, Americans, and Washingtonians specifically, have faced many challenges resulting from failed Democrat policies - from surging inflation, failing student education, and out of control crime brought about by Inslee and Washington Democrats.

Yet, we also have a lot to be thankful for - including servicemembers as well as our first responders who continue their work to keep us all safe and free from crime in an increasingly hostile environment brought on by the defund the police movement.

In 2022, Repubilcans came together and united behind common-sense conservative principles, we created an unprecedented grassroots movement (over 2 MILLION voter contacts in our state!) and stopped Democrats from picking up a super-majority. Federally, the Republican Party flipped the house and ENDED one party-rule in DC.

**In 2023, we are going to work to get our state back on track and bring common-sense back to Olympia.** Our leaders cannot continue to cave to the demands of the radical left. We must elect leaders who will LEAD - not follow. Only the Republican Party is offering this solution to our current problems -[ ](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=7979409e0a&e=6a281f566d)[that is why it is vital we get your support EARLY and begin the work to flip our state and stop this madness from continuing at the highest levels. ](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=d3e020c01a&e=6a281f566d)

Peter, it is clear we have much to be thankful for - but also much to look forward to. We have a lot more work to do and the [earlier we can start](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=e350d1c133&e=6a281f566d) \- the greater our success will be. We are laying the groundwork now for Republican wins in the future - and we have a lot to do. From stopping BAD BILLS in Olympia introduced by radical Democrats, recruiting local candidates for office in 2023, to training and educating those candidates on how to run a successful campaign.

Our organization is donor driven and we need your [support](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=de2af6f76b&e=6a281f566d) if we are going to win. Please consider contributing [$5](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=885b7abfb9&e=6a281f566d), [$10](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=46339fdeac&e=6a281f566d), [$25](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=6b6a2e8ddd&e=6a281f566d), or [any amount](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=09c6c3b9d5&e=6a281f566d) to get us started - _and make it recurring to support us through this new election cycle!_

**I look forward to working with you during this year as we work to elect conservative candidates to local offices, and next year where we will take back the 3rd, flip the 8th, and get rid of Governor Inslee once and for all!**

Thank you and God bless you,

Caleb Heimlich
Chairman
Washington State Republican Party
---

name: Senator Tim Scott
subject: I’m just asking that you open this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
| Fellow American,

It’s Senator Tim Scott, and I need you to take action today to help me and my fellow Senate Republicans win back the Senate.

I wish Republicans had won back the Senate majority and I weren’t having to write this email to you. Today I’m **[asking for your assistance.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=ddea00e973e541879be0762edf3c3a51&_e=r9Yn_rfkfMimlRWABcrehy8z4nN88QEyI3RVEhIs76Jce9m9ZErXeOHvQTPANQXa7FHtIqAf4IU5mfuX2yo5pDS7J7Tce6HdB7j-F6vPeuasa5_R2tCYXXNjduP8dChGiU7MWwHo5zVBJHnux-wsvE56M0-wGhq-3Qc_9qN3Qfo2-kRpHiut-g23wB3IR7Y7nqRe8ov-rX4cw6rq3KziRj1Ijk8lT1he7jCZUOTb0r2z_5roeyMuzV3biXp0qcNR3D6L7ET0ZdNZjZuQCy2OIrIlN4OSBMndbf318BEj-JQWjQEAXUOc7ov96emxAFeWz9AanVo8cD_LQGHxVBRE3I4KGtocE7QGCYAhYJStkiquZOP7aSdOJnHTHmx5VGWQnYbpqsTSFYe7TkpZS5fguPwwYHCVRDQUuP8RhMAmiUs%3D)** Frankly, I am not sure a lot of folks realize what is at stake with Democrats in full control of Washington.

I’ll break it down for you:

1\. **TRILLIONS in additional federal spending.** Dems don’t care how to pay for it.
2\. **Federalization of elections.** They don’t really care who gets to vote as long as new voters vote Democrat, all the while claiming Republicans are guilty of systemic racism.
3\. **NEW deep blue states.** This could cement a Democrat majority for generations to come.
4\. **Nuking of the Filibuster.** While this is a harder get for Dems, they’re putting maximum pressure on centrist democrats to cave and support stripping the minority party any protection still available.

**[It’s paramount you’re on our team.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=ddea00e973e541879be0762edf3c3a51&_e=r9Yn_rfkfMimlRWABcrehy8z4nN88QEyI3RVEhIs76Jce9m9ZErXeOHvQTPANQXa7FHtIqAf4IU5mfuX2yo5pDS7J7Tce6HdB7j-F6vPeuasa5_R2tCYXXNjduP8dChGiU7MWwHo5zVBJHnux-wsvE56M0-wGhq-3Qc_9qN3Qfo2-kRpHiut-g23wB3IR7Y7nqRe8ov-rX4cw6rq3KziRj1Ijk8lT1he7jCZUOTb0r2z_5roeyMuzV3biXp0qcNRCQdZRloifBpFvjNh6WAsF0ZmlgDKtL13N2eviQwO8Lg0KF4vzJsLrOLd0p3-1J5CrleDzRgB5X_fl1fwhf58uzfC0oeGDtKTF1s4yg-JGKcCWF8qbE-tJTEJgEhetjY7tHrrhEFfLPZwdpksWPqVE_UBQMbKqwOHG6LlXTv7xmU%3D)** Republicans only need a net gain of **_TWO_ seat to win back the Senate**, so with that in mind I’m asking for you to put a little skin in the game if you believe in the Republican vision for the country: Donate just $5 or more to our efforts.

**Request for dpwillis67@gmail.com
[Gift $5 or more to help win back the Senate](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=ddea00e973e541879be0762edf3c3a51&_e=r9Yn_rfkfMimlRWABcrehy8z4nN88QEyI3RVEhIs76Jce9m9ZErXeOHvQTPANQXa7FHtIqAf4IU5mfuX2yo5pDS7J7Tce6HdB7j-F6vPeuasa5_R2tCYXXNjduP8dChGiU7MWwHo5zVBJHnux-wsvE56M0-wGhq-3Qc_9qN3Qfo2-kRpHiut-g23wB3IR7Y7nqRe8ov-rX4cw6rq3KziRj1Ijk8lT1he7jCZUOTb0r2z_5roeyMuzV3biXp0qcNRd1hJtnRkpy23rAN7-klWOcptfP2MqrGrlVgH6VAJAT8esRppsfdb2qBS-oS6nttS_RJvLK1sN0OVN4ev5BTtv0dyi6CpY0XrQTmkFECUMxjBOXs2GbZF2I9gsxBH8X3qbDLw4ugBNodOTLEQ-WCrAWRTSBSA3Mge5wlNRP71ayg%3D)
Status: PENDING **
Joe Biden may talk a good game and tweet nice things, but the fact of the matter is this - we’ve spent more money in the past two years than at any time since World War 2. **This rate of spending isn’t sustainable.**

And despite the thinnest Senate majority in years, Democrats think they have a mandate to implement the most radical makeover of society America has ever seen.

I’m committed to stopping them in their tracks, because I know Republicans can – and will – do better, **[but I need your help right now.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=ddea00e973e541879be0762edf3c3a51&_e=r9Yn_rfkfMimlRWABcrehy8z4nN88QEyI3RVEhIs76Jce9m9ZErXeOHvQTPANQXa7FHtIqAf4IU5mfuX2yo5pDS7J7Tce6HdB7j-F6vPeuasa5_R2tCYXXNjduP8dChGiU7MWwHo5zVBJHnux-wsvE56M0-wGhq-3Qc_9qN3Qfo2-kRpHiut-g23wB3IR7Y7nqRe8ov-rX4cw6rq3KziRj1Ijk8lT1he7jCZUOTb0r2z_5roeyMuzV3biXp0qcNRGbGmBLvIl1r9RFoL6DkGYbPYTfVEuug5pRmiGP0M5jcElOJ6ek73FF85HISFHJGoSpK8GzkhdHfpZkIWR3Vw2eScSD2ApC5TpYtPRsBJ6R-1YLwrcDVElNwE0I9inPJqWG-XjR2rpFkT_tHMjF-LVtDHUqFGwwS7ktAvmJFqysM%3D)**

**Request for dpwillis67@gmail.com
[Gift $5 or more to help win back the Senate](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=ddea00e973e541879be0762edf3c3a51&_e=r9Yn_rfkfMimlRWABcrehy8z4nN88QEyI3RVEhIs76Jce9m9ZErXeOHvQTPANQXa7FHtIqAf4IU5mfuX2yo5pDS7J7Tce6HdB7j-F6vPeuasa5_R2tCYXXNjduP8dChGiU7MWwHo5zVBJHnux-wsvE56M0-wGhq-3Qc_9qN3Qfo2-kRpHiut-g23wB3IR7Y7nqRe8ov-rX4cw6rq3KziRj1Ijk8lT1he7jCZUOTb0r2z_5roeyMuzV3biXp0qcNRi6cgxWzOGuBsYiJRej35DQ-Zvw_JOmlMoyYfU1tEqt0HTncO47tyLrCyi2tlU0CTLqybN7OOsiVIvdA8ff2cMYC87Ngtipa07jELhEDfGiA55zvHDKi1c9luGD8g_twRWQLWnB7nNnVPBXQ-V1GWvFT5FM3Q_SIgD13jpaOHd-0%3D)
Status: PENDING **

With you in this fight,

Senator Tim Scott

clean_body: | Fellow American, It’s Senator Tim Scott, and I need you to take action today to help me and my fellow Senate Republicans win back the Senate. I wish Republicans had won back the Senate majority and I weren’t having to write this email to you. Today I’m Frankly, I am not sure a lot of folks realize what is at stake with Democrats in full control of Washington. I’ll break it down for you: 1\. TRILLIONS in additional federal spending. Dems don’t care how to pay for it. 2\. Federalization of elections. They don’t really care who gets to vote as long as new voters vote Democrat, all the while claiming Republicans are guilty of systemic racism. 3\. NEW deep blue states. This could cement a Democrat majority for generations to come. 4\. Nuking of the Filibuster. While this is a harder get for Dems, they’re putting maximum pressure on centrist democrats to cave and support stripping the minority party any protection still available. Republicans only need a net gain of TWO seat to win back the Senate, so with that in mind I’m asking for you to put a little skin in the game if you believe in the Republican vision for the country: Donate just $5 or more to our efforts. Request for dpwillis67@gmail.com Status: PENDING Joe Biden may talk a good game and tweet nice things, but the fact of the matter is this - we’ve spent more money in the past two years than at any time since World War 2. This rate of spending isn’t sustainable. And despite the thinnest Senate majority in years, Democrats think they have a mandate to implement the most radical makeover of society America has ever seen. I’m committed to stopping them in their tracks, because I know Republicans can – and will – do better, Request for dpwillis67@gmail.com Status: PENDING With you in this fight, Senator Tim Scott If you want to help Republicans TAKE BACK THE SENATE, text WIN to 55404 to receive mobile alerts! Message and data rates may apply. Text "STOP" to opt-out. | | Paid for by the NRSC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Here's What Just Went Down in Congress
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=what_just_went_down_congress&n=1)
---
## Congress FAILS to Elect Speaker in Historic Event
**Tuesday, January 3rd, 2022** Friend, Did you see what just happened today in Congress??? For the first time in the age of television, the U.S. House of Representatives failed to elect a Speaker of the House. Which means no business can occur until one is selected by a majority of congressmen. A hold out of 19 conservatives refused to vote for RINO Kevin McCarthy, opting instead to vote for Ohio Representative, Jim Jordan. Don't miss our coverage of this historic event today and why it's important.
## **WATCH on Rumble:**
[](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=w5XKTZ0h8dEcNEoc_HghfMIJAUQDLwdgnTXdJeG-H9OgFRWBo2_9x_FWbj9Dvl5_k2hwRVdouHTO1a2HnjoX7EBSKVsaSXoeiP-JF6EjH8U&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=what_just_went_down_congress&n=2)

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: It’s a new Congress, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
#
Peter,
Today, we started a new Congress, and House Democrats are united and stand ready to defend working people across this country and bring opportunity to everyone!
I talked to Bloomberg about fighting back against the extreme MAGA GOP and holding the line for working people.
[](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/16153?c0=20230103.ggUaTX&refcode=em20230103-2020&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=2020%2E420207%2E8ditSD)
Peter, folks might think the Democrats can’t get things done in a Republican House, but I’m here to prove them wrong. Because here’s a fact about me: I love being underestimated. I’m used to people underestimating me.
I came to Congress with a plan to strengthen our bold Progressive Caucus, and with your help, we’ve accomplished that. And with your continued support, we still have a lot more we can do.
[**Peter, what we do at the beginning of this Congress will set the tone for the next two years. So it’s important to show how strong our movement is — can you donate to support our fight for working people today?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/16153?c0=20230103.ggUaTX&refcode=em20230103-2020&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=2020%2E420207%2E8ditSD)
**[Chip in $3 »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/16153?c0=20230103.ggUaTX&refcode=em20230103-2020&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=2020%2E420207%2E8ditSD)**
We are at a really critical moment in this country — and unfortunately, Republicans are in chaos.
But thankfully, Democrats are united, and we are standing ready to defend working people and give people opportunity.
I can promise you that we will put forward a progressive agenda with policies that benefit YOU, like protecting Social Security and Medicare, passing the PRO Act, instituting a $15 minimum wage, and more.
And I can promise you the Progressive Caucus will be on the front of taking on Republicans around their anti-immigrant, xenophobic, anti-constitutional, anti-democracy initiatives.
[**Peter, help us get the ball rolling in this new Congress by donating to build our movement today. >> **](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/16153?c0=20230103.ggUaTX&refcode=em20230103-2020&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=2020%2E420207%2E8ditSD)
I am so proud and honored to be here and represent you and all of the people across this country who deserve the better future we’re fighting for. Thank you for your support.
In solidarity,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20230103-2020-footer&t=23&refcode2=2020_420207_8ditSD&akid=2020%2E420207%2E8ditSD)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=24&akid=2020%2E420207%2E8ditSD)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=2020%2E420207%2E8ditSD)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

**_[That's why we need you to fill out this urgent survey by 11:59 PM tonight and help us SAVE AMERICA!](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=e76d8f512ccd46759f4703246c2385e8&_e=Srdpq_dZGIZLTFtVBisrHRFqShWCkUk1xOpt0kFNnDaG4Ucvd8tWe0e0MCRGOXI0wGsWPpAfuGaZRlNo5XQ3-TXZwddkqy3BnlrKPEsloGcHSAbNXfiaZVzVT3UIFwuIswqd4x0ON8gLYKxmlXt5pyRCglrkXVgTekjN2JT701eO7zhQlGM9H1q0wNPDADhw2dxRy2i8LuGBEg0UE5GHXyZQHPz8uVJRHTVwEeV4qIU_Pzyf488y1Mm0wT_-F6vxEQj1sQ7MLn8rGD9cMP0PEqs26CteXGFRR96mK8EvaWOZwI0Az6R9hKv5fVfAMcRAnIbhcL0V5euHRZ6RgTr-w-RSj5ITWBDcv69cJii6eE5McM-ShJD8SIX0i-U5DSMLARjhAj-6U1C8ElwtJSAomg%3D%3D "That’s why we need you to fill out this urgent survey by 11:59 PM tonight and help us SAVE AMERICA!")_**

body:

Friend,

I will be the first to tell you there were plenty of times I thought about giving up and throwing in the towel.

**At this point -- that’s just not an option. **

Our case proved, without a doubt, that not everything was as it seemed during Arizona’s November election.

Now, the far-left political operatives and Fake News media are hoping this recent ruling will end my fight once and for all.

**They are dead wrong. I’m not going to stop fighting.**

I promise you -- I will appeal this case and continue our struggle to secure our election until my very last breath.

**However, I need to know -- do I have your support?**

| [**YES, YOU HAVE MY SUPPORT!** ](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c90865%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=xwSOi1LbzsVQjytM33A%2fug&sysid=1)

Best,

Kari Lake

name: American Federation for Children
subject: Parents deserve CHOICE! OPEN if you agree…
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by American Federation for Children |
body:
The Education Freedom Pledge is a way for lawmakers and citizens alike to stand for school choice!
| | | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2ztcomgajuvdi9m3qphe0qn130f0i5v4if7ute52o_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c3j60o36c9h2bs)
---
| | Friend, We believe that ALL families in America deserve a wide range of educational choices for their kids, whether they opt for public schools, private schools, charter schools, OR homeschooling.**That’s why we launched the Education Freedom Pledge in the Fall of 2021...** _to rally grassroots supporters of school choice and garner support from legislative figures across the country._ The result? Thousands of everyday Americans and legislators across the country signed the pledge, took a stand for school choice, and made a difference in the school choice movement nationwide.This winter, with so many school choice initiatives once again hanging in the balance in states across the country, **we’re RE-LAUNCHING the Education Freedom Pledge to re-ignite support for SCHOOL CHOICE!** _Will you take a stand for school choice today, Friend?_**Here is the pledge...**
---
| | _“I pledge to support policies that promote parental rights in education and educational freedom. This includes the right of parents to voice their opinions at school board meetings and to take their children's taxpayer-funded education dollars to the education providers of their choosing - whether it be a public, private, charter, or home school.”_
---
| | [**SIGN THE PLEDGE TODAY >>**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zubu5c5jpdsif9274s2a3d3l5jak6i9m00kfsnuo_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c3j60o36c9h2bs)
---
| | **Friend, if you agree that parents deserve CHOICE – _and kids deserve better_ – [_join our movement and sign the Education Freedom Pledge today! >>_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zt203rn2l0k6p879javr3rpideg000s33m2312no_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c3j60o36c9h2bs)**
---
| | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2ztnrs72n35fl8254sasi61nhaau8p5btfict2d38_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c3j60o36c9h2bs)
---
| | When you sign the Education Freedom Pledge, you join a diverse coalition of some of the MOST influential legislators and school choice activists in America.**Some of the Education Freedom Pledge’s top signers include...**
---
| |
* Iowa Governor Kim Reynolds
* AFC Senior Fellow Corey DeAngelis
* Wisconsin Speaker of the House Robin Vos
* Florida Education Commissioner Manny Diaz Jr.
* **[_Add YOUR NAME here >>_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zek9po7cop9cne9hmao9asm809p6a4fooamdtj70_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c3j60o36c9h2bs)**

---
| | Friend, 72% of Americans now support school choice after millions of families saw first-hand during the pandemic that a one-size-fits-all education isn’t best for ANY individual child. Unfortunately, the opponents of our movement – the teachers’ unions – wield irrational levels of influence on education policy, **and we need your voice.** **If enough grassroots Americans sign the Education Freedom Pledge, we can overcome the teacher's unions and give families the choices they deserve.[_We hope you’ll take a stand today! >>_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zji2u40ti85rbcrgh3riplkkghtlfv5ag6if6qs8_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c3j60o36c9h2bs)**
---
| | [**SIGN TODAY >> STAND FOR SCHOOL CHOICE!**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zv8nmgbdr3ljhe8gmcl4qk0tn170d2n6pa701mmo_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c3j60o36c9h2bs)

name: GOP Presidential
subject: Bezos & Musk investing billions to transform America
body:
Have you heard of COP26? Almost nobody has. Amid the distractions caused by lingering health issues, conflicts overseas, shor
| Dear Reader, This is troubling. Have you heard of [COP26?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zcdneu0u21du0vs2dl5angufi6j8dp5oicjo25mg_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c3j60o32cjh2bs) Almost nobody has. Amid the distractions caused by lingering health issues, conflicts overseas, shortages, and inflation... Treasury Secretary Janet Yellen recently took the stage at COP26 in Glasgow, Scotland to address some of the world's most powerful people, including:
* U.S. President, Joe Biden...
* British Prime Minister, Boris Johnson...
* Canadian Prime Minister, Justin Trudeau...
* French President Emmanuel Macron...
* ... and many more...

From the stage, Yellen called for world leaders to commit to a $150 trillion 'global transition' of our economy. Since then, Bank of America has [signed this accord,](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zvrogqrv9a50baf9od8enjuov2k711shodi1i8ng_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c3j60o32cjh2bs) along with 131 countries, 234 cities, and 695 of the world's biggest companies. Jeff Bezos and Elon Musk have invested in this 'transformation' as well. What is it that Yellen, Biden, Trudeau, Bezos and Musk are pushing for? And what does it mean for your money? Investigative journalist and renowned economist, Nomi Prins has followed the money... [And what she's found is startling. ](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zk009g3rfoakdhejm2cqf3am4p1864n1o5slr6j8_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c3j60o32cjh2bs) She says: **" While most Americans are distracted by mainstream media headlines calling for a stock market crash, I've found evidence that shows where the elites are spending $150 trillion to 'transform' the economy. Most Americans will be shocked when they see what happens next."** I had to know more, so I scheduled an interview for Nomi to go deeper into the details of this 'transformation.' She agreed to do the interview on one condition: she wanted to record it so she could get her message in front of as many Americans as possible before it's too late. [Go here to see how this 'transformation' will play out - and what it means for your money.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zp637ng71015rgo07u7ub86p3e03oj4i51u3fkcg_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c3j60o32cjh2bs) Regards, Maria Bonaventura
Senior Managing Editor, _Distortion Report_

name: 1600 Daily
subject: Don’t miss this
body:
Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course
| | | This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zpo7427uhonnvpk48tv3h37mjeig6gcu812g9f6g_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c3j60o36cdh2bs) Dear Fellow American, [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z74254ptms7eb5idac0io6bctfd3ekmhoccrug98_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c3j60o36cdh2bs) I hope you’re having a great day so far. Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy. The course features Hillsdale College’s world-renowned faculty. It teaches the original design and purpose of the Constitution, the challenges it faced during the Civil War, and how it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and liberalism. It concludes by setting forth how limited government under the Constitution might be revived. “Constitution 101” is modeled after the course that all Hillsdale students are required to take, and this DVD box set is your opportunity to experience it for yourself. I hope you take advantage of this offer, and I have included a secure link for you here: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/constitution-101-dvd/**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zea104jnghhb69ti6bffct0u989tphlpfol4s5pg_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c3j60o36cdh2bs) As you know, Hillsdale takes no government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. So, your support is essential to expanding our national educational outreach efforts, like free online courses, designed to restore and defend liberty. As I mentioned above, supplies of the new “Constitution 101” DVD box set are limited, so I hope you’ll reserve your copy today. Sincerely, Bill Gray Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth—Defending Liberty since 1844
---

name: ICYMI News
subject: Access “C.S. Lewis on Christianity”
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivatin

| | | This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z74rk3bf3210jqfneun9p2dntnt8f3bitlmdvp30_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c3j68o76chh2bs)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zeqpnigioi2a2pp2la1qichq4v6np507r8kqhu8g_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c3j68o76chh2bs)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zjshvjoq7vqsfmevtllarv18bsg8tshstgp140cg_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c3j68o76chh2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zl42p8ves0mot4e15esmbpqhrp5vpq53obhk1s40_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c3j68o76chh2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

name: American Update
subject: Bezos & Musk investing billions to transform America
body:
| Dear Reader, This is troubling. Have you heard of [COP26?](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c655684%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=UeNuQIRz7tTXRqgHz8mWkQ&sysid=1) Almost nobody has. Amid the distractions caused by lingering health issues, conflicts overseas, shortages, and inflation... Treasury Secretary Janet Yellen recently took the stage at COP26 in Glasgow, Scotland to address some of the world’s most powerful people, including:
* U.S. President, Joe Biden...
* British Prime Minister, Boris Johnson...
* Canadian Prime Minister, Justin Trudeau...
* French President Emmanuel Macron...
* ... and many more...

From the stage, Yellen called for world leaders to commit to a $150 trillion ‘global transition’ of our economy. Since then, Bank of America has [signed this accord,](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c655695%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6MV7XvlaP3jExwRi3xFf7w&sysid=1) along with 131 countries, 234 cities, and 695 of the world’s biggest companies. Jeff Bezos and Elon Musk have invested in this ‘transformation’ as well. What is it that Yellen, Biden, Trudeau, Bezos and Musk are pushing for? And what does it mean for your money? Investigative journalist and renowned economist, Nomi Prins has followed the money... [And what she’s found is startling. ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c655696%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=FQnaGJzyhKhVZPFB1HCJNA&sysid=1) She says: **“While most Americans are distracted by mainstream media headlines calling for a stock market crash, I’ve found evidence that shows where the elites are spending $150 trillion to ‘transform’ the economy. Most Americans will be shocked when they see what happens next.”** I had to know more, so I scheduled an interview for Nomi to go deeper into the details of this ‘transformation.’ She agreed to do the interview on one condition: she wanted to record it so she could get her message in front of as many Americans as possible before it’s too late. [Go here to see how this ‘transformation’ will play out - and what it means for your money. ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c655697%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=w%2bYIrUR0NUQ9V6tTTyfDng&sysid=1) Regards, Maria Bonaventura
Senior Managing Editor, _Distortion Report_
---

_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0391%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=KlFKg5M2GRAE7B9vbV1NUg&sysid=1)_

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0391%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=KlFKg5M2GRAE7B9vbV1NUg&sysid=1)

name: Matt Gaetz
subject: Help me stop Kevin McCarthy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Matt Gaetz**
body:
Dear Peter,

Three times the uniparty tried to force Kevin McCarthy on the MAGA base as Speaker of the House.

_Three times I voted no and defeated a scheme to install the biggest alligator in charge of the D.C. swamp_.

But special interests and RINOs are gearing up for another attempt to impose the establishment's handpicked puppet as Speaker of the House.

The _" Only Kevin"_ crowd threatened America First conservatives who fought for real change and a Congress that functions for the American people, not the special interests, with losing committee assignments and primary challenges.

**_Will you help me hold the line?_**

**[Join me in the fight to stop Kevin McCarthy by chipping in today](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61343187:WEV07lDWN:m:1:2365227053:5ABE2180843B5CF56CD411B145382758:r).**

The pro-Trump movement must reject a man who sold shares of himself to climb the ladder in Washington.

That's why I proudly led the fight to vote _" no"_ and defeat Kevin McCarthy's bid for Speaker of the House on three straight ballots.

The American people fired one liberal speaker who fought tooth and nail for Democrat priorities.

**MAGA Republicans cannot replace Nancy Pelosi with another liberal speaker from California who fights against the conservative cause.**

But the swamp is set to summon all its fury, pull every lever of power and its disposal, and try and twist arms with threats to end the careers of the 20 conservatives fighting to pull the plug on Kevin McCarthy's

body:
MAGA Republicans already wield the power to shut down government processes | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56857722/386209967/966991095?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhODQ5YTNmOS0zNThjLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kjhCFOE-qv9BfviPhwFDZ_AcXk2T5PnTGp8mzCuXAX4=&emci=d3c1667f-308c-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=a849a3f9-358c-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=43402272) | Peter, Yesterday, my staff, my family, and I gathered on Capitol Hill for what was supposed to be my swearing-in ceremony. I know many of you waited eagerly for the livestream to get to the good part. Instead, what we got was chaos and calamity. MAGA Republicans spent the afternoon fighting over who should lead their party. Ultimately, they rejected Kevin McCarthy as their Speaker in three different floor votes. This is the first time in 100 years that a Speaker election required more than one floor vote. Members can’t be sworn in or begin working on legislation until the GOP agrees on a Speaker – something they have had months and months and months to decide on. Something else I learned is that our staff cannot be paid, access their emails, or get their badges until we are all sworn in. **_The GOP is quite literally making governing impossible. _** **If the GOP can’t even agree on who should be their next Speaker, how can they effectively govern for the American people? I’m taking yesterday as a sign that we need to show voters that Democrats are united – and start building a nationwide movement to take back the House in 2024.[Can you pitch in a donation of any amount to help us capitalize on this moment and build momentum towards a Democratic majority in 2024?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56857723/386209968/1869993778?refcode=E19941-20230104-SwearingInVote-SL-GOP-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=27&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhODQ5YTNmOS0zNThjLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kjhCFOE-qv9BfviPhwFDZ_AcXk2T5PnTGp8mzCuXAX4=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | **[$5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56857724/386209969/1869993778?express_lane=true&refcode=E19941-20230104-SwearingInVote-EL-GOP-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhODQ5YTNmOS0zNThjLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kjhCFOE-qv9BfviPhwFDZ_AcXk2T5PnTGp8mzCuXAX4=)** | **[$15](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56857725/386209970/1869993778?express_lane=true&refcode=E19941-20230104-SwearingInVote-EL-GOP-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhODQ5YTNmOS0zNThjLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kjhCFOE-qv9BfviPhwFDZ_AcXk2T5PnTGp8mzCuXAX4=)**

With more extreme members of the Republican Party already wielding the power to shut down government processes and stall work, we should all be concerned. Becca

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Wisconsin’s Supreme Court has a 4-3 right-wing majority. This allowed 2022 voter suppression efforts to remain in place, and protected the most absurd gerrymander in the country. One of the right wing hack judges is leaving the court. There’s an open primary February 18th, with the top-two vote getters running in the general election in April.
body:
Important State Supreme Court seat up for grabs
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T98ab4121-54bd-47f9-bbac-b710c3cc5844/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **_Perhaps the most important election of the year is less than six weeks away. In Wisconsin--one of the two or three closest swing states in the country--there will be a primary for Wisconsin Supreme Court._** _Why is this so important? Let us count the ways: Right now Wisconsin has a 4-3 right-wing Court majority. This allowed voter suppression efforts to remain in place in 2022, including a ban on absentee-ballot drop boxes and closing polling places in disproportionately minority neighborhoods. Additionally, it protected the most absurd gerrymander in the country. Democratic Governor Tony Evers won his race 51-48%. Yet, Republicans won a two thirds supermajority in the WI senate and missed one in the WI assembly by one vote. _ **_Thankfully, one of the right wing hack judges is leaving the court. This will lead to an open primary February 18th, with the top-two vote getters running in the general election in April. We must elect a Democrat, _**_and in an ideal world we'd elect both Democrats in the primary, ensuring the eventual general election winner--and a new Wisconsin Supreme Court majority--is progressive and respects democracy._ [**Can you join us in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can afford to candidate Judge Janet Protasiewicz or Judge Everett Mitchell, or both? | | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Think Washington is broken? Call for a new Speaker today
body:
| | |
---
**Please call now. Make calls right now to these 20 Members of Congress, plus potentially one more call.** These 20 Members of Congress need your support. They need to hear from you right now. If you do not want the status quo from Congress, **call**. If you do not want the swamp running Washington DC and in turn your lives, **call**. If you do not want another massive, bloated, $1.7T omnibus spending bill like we saw a couple of weeks ago, **_call_**. If you do not want COVID related mandates, **call**. If you want to peel back the wokeness in our schools, **call**. Kevin McCarthy currently, still does not have the votes to be Speaker of the House. He and his allies have been all over the news putting negative pressure on these 20 courageous Members of Congress who are trying to make Congress more functional and to stop the status quo in Washington, DC. **If you think Washington is broken, call and tweet the following Representatives and tell them to continue fighting AGAINST the status quo in Washington, DC.** _(NOTE: These numbers may have changed for the new Congress and the House.gov website has not updated the numbers yet. If you get the wrong number, please call the Capitol Switchboard at: (202) 224-3121.)_

| | PLUS, you need to make one more phone call if your Member of Congress is a Republican and NOT on this list, then call that Congressman and ask why they are VOTING FOR THE STATUS QUO which is a dysfunctional Congress by voting for Kevin McCarthy. You can call the Capitol Switchboard at (202) 224-3121 to reach your Member of Congress. Once you finish your calls, please let us know what you think about the Speaker Race **[using this form](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.-GnXhtMoY8rw)**. **SOME MISCONCEPTIONS AND FACTS** **STATEMENT:**_If these 20 do not get in line and vote for Kevin McCarthy, we will have a Democratic Speaker of the House._**FACT:** The only way we get a Democratic Speaker of the House is if Republicans decide to vote FOR a Democratic Member of Congress. That is highly unlikely. **STATEMENT:**_The 20 are only doing this to get a Committee Assignment and that is what this is all about._ **FACT:** These Members of Congress have been asking for changes to the House Rules since last July. Their focus has always been on process and policy. Only when Kevin McCarthy asked them for a list of who they wanted on which committees did they answer that question in an attempt to negotiate in good faith. Kevin McCarthy has since used the answer to **_his_** question against them. **STATEMENT:**_Kevin McCarthy said, “I earned this job. We earned this majority, and G—d—mit we are going to win it today.”_**FACT:** Sadly, this is true. **STATEMENT:**_Members of House Republican Conference have threatened to remove all 20 of those not voting for McCarthy from Committees._ **FACT:** That is true. A Member of Congress did say they would remove anyone who voted against Kevin McCarthy from Committees. Other Congressmen applauded. Kevin McCarthy was present and did not say he would not allow that to happen if he was elected Speaker. **STATEMENT:**_No one knows what the 20 who are voting against McCarthy wants._ **FACT:** Those voting against McCarthy have been clear with what they want. Please [watch this video](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6NDkxMDk0ODksImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFRIiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjMwMDQtZDgyZDQ0OWQyOThjNGVjMGIxNzM0NDg1ZjI3YjU1MDkiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMjEiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3R3aXR0ZXIuY29tL1JlcENoaXBSb3kvc3RhdHVzLzE2MTAzODcxMDczMjI5NDk2MzI_Y3h0PUhId1dnTURUcmRlaW45a3NBQUFBJm1pZD00NjI4NSZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVEifQ/ZTADGvxEKoEMe8AhJ5EfMg) from Chip Roy yesterday on the Floor of the House of Representatives who explained why he was nominating Jim Jordan. Additionally, here is a [55-page document](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6NDkxMDk0ODksImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFRIiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjMwMDQtZDgyZDQ0OWQyOThjNGVjMGIxNzM0NDg1ZjI3YjU1MDkiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMjIiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3BlcnJ5LmhvdXNlLmdvdi91cGxvYWRlZGZpbGVzL2hmY19yb2FkX21hcC5wZGY_bWlkPTQ2Mjg1JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/vXBUJIRRFGdmcwtujzBDLA) that was written and published in or around October 2022 outlining the changes they want to see happen. **STATEMENT:** _Who is the alternative? Who will be the Speaker?_ **FACT:** The person who can get the majority of the vote will not be evident if and until Kevin McCarthy concedes and acknowledges he cannot get the votes to win the Speakership. Please call right now today. Once you call, please feel free to [fill this form out](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.) to give us your feedback on the Speaker Race. Thank you! In liberty, Jenny Beth

name: Jameson Ellis
subject: Ever been hurt my loved ones?
body:
(This is for you)

| | | |

**FELLOW PATRIOTS:**
Have you ever been hurt by loved ones and been left feeling hopeless? Then you need to watch this.

Ray Higdon is a man who had it all... the beautiful wife, the kids, the house, the money, and the success... but something was still missing. Watch as he explains the concept of "sacred wounds" and the impact they can have on your life.

If the video below helps you in any way and you believe there are others it could help, please like and share.

_For Liberty,_

name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: Don’t miss this
body:
Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a c Hillsdale College | This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=ff4367447c3e466291061ed2c3824375&_e=hoR7re-9LG9RNDLDYG3DAhq482x7b5fDptG2KNh-hEcb_IdwkD8odFmaG11Uk2JhBt5dgc9dpWv5fvbdVtpSTkKHxA2NU3lktfzlLyVuhJ6u_ow1MKg9SBOXbutSSLb6TO_uP5XuTLqHnb7Xf9KO7StvM_b_9XZ_7xyMzejCvm0llAn1-0OGo6RwrX-oDaecGIoX9dJCcijdeZGf11CuvzUNg9zNClAu7WksDd4trERW-9h7SkMGo9YuT83-ENY0yTcisXRewM3EQFhJCJA-EoJ6j-QIfesa9AHfJfWuMIqwZJJsXwmE8o0b15x9qYVRXcUvnmLpIrhAdhj2THBTO4trCTkE39ZflNODaWUOi5bm8FwIPjlxUva6Fv0JWpaPQ-y2VlXep6VlgLUysPxwVA%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=ff4367447c3e466291061ed2c3824375&_e=hoR7re-9LG9RNDLDYG3DAhq482x7b5fDptG2KNh-hEcb_IdwkD8odFmaG11Uk2JhBt5dgc9dpWv5fvbdVtpSTkKHxA2NU3lktfzlLyVuhJ6u_ow1MKg9SBOXbutSSLb6TO_uP5XuTLqHnb7Xf9KO7StvM_b_9XZ_7xyMzejCvm0llAn1-0OGo6RwrX-oDaecGIoX9dJCcijdeZGf11CuvzUNg9zNClAu7WksDd4trERW-9h7SkMGo9YuT83-ENY0S9MIeKhkzHpptFAxhpvNra-fimFoahk9TV-X9spymD4L00gFouM3b4R_qobTvy6V3kVE0y3mtcogTa5f6nr5GNEVMf1KcemmT1W62GgMoAQv1JB0RqUXThNGTII67PAGygdZvnya3Q_ccv4PsXSzIw%3D%3D) I hope you’re having a great day so far. Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy. The course features Hillsdale’s excellent faculty — the same professors who teach here on campus. It teaches the original design and purpose of the Constitution, the challenges it faced during the Civil War, and how it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and liberalism. It concludes by setting forth how limited government under the Constitution might be revived. “Constitution 101” is modeled after the course that all Hillsdale students are required to take, and this DVD box set is your opportunity to experience it for yourself. I hope you take advantage of this offer, and I have included a secure link for you here: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/constitution-101-dvd/**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=ff4367447c3e466291061ed2c3824375&_e=hoR7re-9LG9RNDLDYG3DAhq482x7b5fDptG2KNh-hEcb_IdwkD8odFmaG11Uk2JhBt5dgc9dpWv5fvbdVtpSTkKHxA2NU3lktfzlLyVuhJ6u_ow1MKg9SBOXbutSSLb6TO_uP5XuTLqHnb7Xf9KO7StvM_b_9XZ_7xyMzejCvm0llAn1-0OGo6RwrX-oDaecGIoX9dJCcijdeZGf11CuvzUNg9zNClAu7WksDd4trERW-9h7SkMGo9YuT83-ENY0EDbohA2QfKNr07cpGx7FxNV2CONtr0INPdIic9z0t56PgoXrkWv489WtBOLGk-z8qV75dqh9NY8gT52W-Sba21ET-aXD0em-JKmAy7OFLOMcUD9Ii1CO-sc7y6901iSmhtj9uLKq4t_g_yt4QlTI-A%3D%3D) As you know, Hillsdale takes no government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. So, your support is essential to expanding our national educational outreach efforts, like free online courses, designed to restore and defend liberty. As I mentioned above, supplies of the new “Constitution 101” DVD box set are limited, so I hope you’ll reserve your copy today. Sincerely, Bill Gray Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth—Defending Liberty since 1844
---

name: Conservatives Give
subject: Reserve your DVD box set
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language

| This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a2126a92a80248199bf35c2fa229110b&_e=t0S7RWaG9yDM-I1V_-y3jSe8a2a4ThO-b8D4mjauFT-4wSt0tZ0QPCJDStaQE3twl4AbLQj0RuuWj-QzZVWqSB8oY98VEoP7P6txwpbOjyYTe9cdwlc47eOjgynr7SCCpN0N71dqC_jrdZMGLnNXt_kKQM-k2ULXIUpUyd_bJuQf0FjedPO9nBfuS1GJ5WzLigQlp55iGSEE0FFYoFlwUlSTDuxiYW_r1YPWEcbfUo3zM9yzepIIHgcD98CTSUotw-IZuWZx9EgKPB520q_vsTWx0LMMW5sUw3ZL2juJjb30H2HbY0NXFI10PtrQWrlIdXaWoHN0PhXHhnuiTCKqL5XaP2FI6fAZcwKipDGml4BTyQ3dwXZa3KrWVPk8EbLUuDMN9B0kPtszG9lTllP4LOFapge5n1oCDHCydFSzTlnaiypn9Fo4n_pfvd5YJecR)

| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a2126a92a80248199bf35c2fa229110b&_e=t0S7RWaG9yDM-I1V_-y3jSe8a2a4ThO-b8D4mjauFT-4wSt0tZ0QPCJDStaQE3twl4AbLQj0RuuWj-QzZVWqSB8oY98VEoP7P6txwpbOjyYTe9cdwlc47eOjgynr7SCCpN0N71dqC_jrdZMGLnNXt_kKQM-k2ULXIUpUyd_bJuQf0FjedPO9nBfuS1GJ5WzLigQlp55iGSEE0FFYoFlwUlSTDuxiYW_r1YPWEcbfUo3zM9yzepIIHgcD98CTSUotw-IZuWZx9EgKPB520q_vsS_Qi_zzL-r3nR1eHPqhrODQZm38HAGlxdsCU0MpzAgBM0q9TfiELYpgxykEyT8ZnV0I3SA-43HSMXfqz2-ZmgdwlB5og-2wgc1OaNn3M4ENvdYwv_UfW2a20IoseAKJ3_z1kXg_3sxp7HeI5DP78dehwg4JITRkWAD-u_OukEeS)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a2126a92a80248199bf35c2fa229110b&_e=t0S7RWaG9yDM-I1V_-y3jSe8a2a4ThO-b8D4mjauFT-4wSt0tZ0QPCJDStaQE3twl4AbLQj0RuuWj-QzZVWqSB8oY98VEoP7P6txwpbOjyYTe9cdwlc47eOjgynr7SCCpN0N71dqC_jrdZMGLnNXt_kKQM-k2ULXIUpUyd_bJuQf0FjedPO9nBfuS1GJ5WzLigQlp55iGSEE0FFYoFlwUlSTDuxiYW_r1YPWEcbfUo3zM9yzepIIHgcD98CTSUotw-IZuWZx9EgKPB520q_vsaMDxBDInhNrMwDhZH-RzZwyOp-E05xszDIXnCPGIHv91RD5U9GLFFb0mNw4xDOhvw--62pFtS8Emgz8Xr3wf8tRHLqoYsmmOqW2S_kDQO5TPDKHufTlZLvTA55ufiPDwXarNA0JsAuAvqgBE7jOpjTlSQzRUYm3bnEGKA94P4J6)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a2126a92a80248199bf35c2fa229110b&_e=t0S7RWaG9yDM-I1V_-y3jSe8a2a4ThO-b8D4mjauFT-4wSt0tZ0QPCJDStaQE3twl4AbLQj0RuuWj-QzZVWqSB8oY98VEoP7P6txwpbOjyYTe9cdwlc47eOjgynr7SCCpN0N71dqC_jrdZMGLnNXt_kKQM-k2ULXIUpUyd_bJuQf0FjedPO9nBfuS1GJ5WzLigQlp55iGSEE0FFYoFlwUlSTDuxiYW_r1YPWEcbfUo3zM9yzepIIHgcD98CTSUotw-IZuWZx9EgKPB520q_vsVSxQKQk3jsys_aIDAOffdYlNxjyV9MboBDwepTbAYWbAGEevvfcgon7mimYOL_txUzTP7x-KJged6NvvwfU1AcpfetNbrY-2wwAH3Y-gpfsdC9I9UoNFb7AZcBAZf8q8AV8HOIzH4BptoW2uWvPRWfzHT5UquSyHt9zCqborOhm).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: Bezos & Musk investing billions to transform America
body:
| Dear Reader, This is troubling. Have you heard of [COP26?](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=93aaafae5ad144bf928d0be648e51a19&_e=6W7Uc605FuyvJOw3AI-nDQb6QVAvtCLer7mtSvbDOS0uKlsexp8nulV3YhHCJq8xaBtcSi8pimMd1tzgUthTCqYT0jiZlLqk3myBpMm-cAyX0Li8bs6CNCVloRibHH0FKHESphb0fNrH_YGJwD-JTN1j2VV8Fv3qtNBsQT6Fsf7JOSHTrgBMYa3kpeB7XwndXUVf2RObw83wTBh1z_epA2OzaOp9dW2iAXJ2eLyibZefoH_mVsf4mWd5pthaUhig) Almost nobody has. Amid the distractions caused by lingering health issues, conflicts overseas, shortages, and inflation... Treasury Secretary Janet Yellen recently took the stage at COP26 in Glasgow, Scotland to address some of the world's most powerful people, including:
* U.S. President, Joe Biden...
* British Prime Minister, Boris Johnson...
* Canadian Prime Minister, Justin Trudeau...
* French President Emmanuel Macron...
* ... and many more...

From the stage, Yellen called for world leaders to commit to a $150 trillion 'global transition' of our economy. Since then, Bank of America has [signed this accord,](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=93aaafae5ad144bf928d0be648e51a19&_e=6W7Uc605FuyvJOw3AI-nDQb6QVAvtCLer7mtSvbDOS0uKlsexp8nulV3YhHCJq8xaBtcSi8pimMd1tzgUthTCqYT0jiZlLqk3myBpMm-cAw9RmSnIdXCYPXzBQ77bDumx3abAs-nJrxSgezQE3kswCNOXWu9I8qKJHGOR5ROihtj25hSLWeNleOsPaf3L5kRCPyAbiIBGFMhTd8JGczrO8DBJz1d8mMARpKCxy7PlQytpI8PyOsoVHmkO0APw9Ee) along with 131 countries, 234 cities, and 695 of the world's biggest companies. Jeff Bezos and Elon Musk have invested in this 'transformation' as well. What is it that Yellen, Biden, Trudeau, Bezos and Musk are pushing for? And what does it mean for your money? Investigative journalist and renowned economist, Nomi Prins has followed the money... [And what she's found is startling. ](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=93aaafae5ad144bf928d0be648e51a19&_e=6W7Uc605FuyvJOw3AI-nDQb6QVAvtCLer7mtSvbDOS0uKlsexp8nulV3YhHCJq8xaBtcSi8pimMd1tzgUthTCqYT0jiZlLqk3myBpMm-cAzf8VzntdEbs6S5ej1mLGXuDKjbwpGu04NjGwaB-5HbOGI__FzPIv7EJIkQxtxw_K_94x7TQZUhCwohlFnmRdjuEvk5fRV0VBgiRxYGCb6Qq4s_dZklOZzxXyinJpoYm0n04rEGRhoF__pEewIhq_-6) She says: **" While most Americans are distracted by mainstream media headlines calling for a stock market crash, I've found evidence that shows where the elites are spending $150 trillion to 'transform' the economy. Most Americans will be shocked when they see what happens next."** I had to know more, so I scheduled an interview for Nomi to go deeper into the details of this 'transformation.' She agreed to do the interview on one condition: she wanted to record it so she could get her message in front of as many Americans as possible before it's too late. [Go here to see how this 'transformation' will play out - and what it means for your money. ](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=93aaafae5ad144bf928d0be648e51a19&_e=6W7Uc605FuyvJOw3AI-nDQb6QVAvtCLer7mtSvbDOS0uKlsexp8nulV3YhHCJq8xaBtcSi8pimMd1tzgUthTCqYT0jiZlLqk3myBpMm-cAwSfK6x8vDN1ycXhfs0YhCzk5X4m_Wj-rYL--yPe9q_2V2Fo5AeLoVvDhaP7UCzXHWUD5ENgmUna-cippfx157x3GDFrNFydlKunLncniNRSnWRiUSybhGhwmFaUnSUcq_9k3dkXIqZeEftPbZMkwCG) Regards, Maria Bonaventura
Senior Managing Editor, _Distortion Report_
---

Sent to Freedom Nation Today subscribers.
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: C7 Tac
subject: Easiest new mag/ammo speed loaders in stock - just cover cost of shipping!
body:
I've got a little present for you...
---
| | | | | | | **WE GOT YOUR 6.**
---

| | | | | | | I've got a little present for you.
Listen, we just got our first shipment of **[Gunner Gear Speed Loaders](https://links.c7tac.com/a/1537/click/11113/6374453/375ad83bfed78fb84fa1bb657c0c43a4fadf0d44/034bc24b2f5664bb32abd76b58d6a59878e881ed)** in the warehouse...
And I'm so pumped about it, we are **giving away the first 500 for NOTHING** but a small shipping and handling charge.
I don't know about you, but we care about our thumbs!
And we want to help you spend more time shootin' and less time loadin' magazines... **WAY less time.**
This thing loads a full mag in about **20 seconds flat...**
Load 9mm or .40 S&W, this bad boy eats em up!
Some people are saying I'm crazy for handing out 500 of these bad boys but I say the best type of advertising is word of mouth!
**[Grab your complimentary Speed Loader right here (Free S&H!)](https://links.c7tac.com/a/1537/click/11113/6374453/375ad83bfed78fb84fa1bb657c0c43a4fadf0d44/034bc24b2f5664bb32abd76b58d6a59878e881ed)**

P.S. If you have ANY questions or concerns, please drop us an email, support@c7tac.com. ~ _Nicole_

name: Anthony D'Esposito
subject: Asarah B'Tevet, 10th day
body:
Peter, Today marks the fast of Asarah b’Tevet, the 10th day of Tevet, and commemorates the beginning of the Babylonian siege of Jerusalem.
[](https://despositoforcongress.cmail19.com/t/y-l-nhdkjc-iubikjttk-r/) Peter, Today marks the fast of Asarah b'Tevet, the 10th day of Tevet, and commemorates the beginning of the Babylonian siege of Jerusalem. It led to the destruction of the First Beit HaMikdash, and the exile of the Jews to Babylon.We're taught that the main distinction of this fast is to donate the money we would normally spend on food for charity.I hope you had an easy and meaningful fast.Blessings,
Anthony | | [Unsubscribe](https://despositoforcongress.cmail19.com/t/y-u-nhdkjc-iubikjttk-y/)
---

Peter, Today marks the fast of Asarah b'Tevet, the 10th day of Tevet, and commemorates the beginning of the Babylonian siege of Jerusalem. It led to the destruction of the First Beit HaMikdash, and the exile of the Jews to Babylon.We're taught that the main distinction of this fast is to donate the money we would normally spend on food for charity.I hope you had an easy and meaningful fast.Blessings, Anthony | |

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Kevin McCarthy lost three votes for Speaker of the House yesterday. He just lost a 4th vote today, and we’re hearing that he’s relying on a meeting Donald Trump is brokering with the House Freedom Caucus to try and resolve the situation. The new Democratic Leader Hakeem Jeffries is going to need a lot of help as he tries to keep the House focused on working for the voters like us who sent them there.
body:
House Republicans in chaos
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4a2c4fae-f4e9-4f78-9f06-c315848666cd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, [**_Democratic Leader Hakeem Jeffries will need our support to continue effectively fighting GOP seditionists, and supporting Democrats across the country in critical races. Will you join us to support his work with $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can afford for the battle?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcd7233c5-12d4-404c-8cac-5513bcf80a4d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Nobody alive has ever seen what happened in the GOP House Caucus yesterday ... and today we still don’t have a Speaker of the House._ **_As suspected, Kevin McCarthy lacked the votes to become Speaker. (Four times. So far. Who knows how long this will go on.) But, for some reason, he chose to hold a vote anyhow as his party devolved into bedlam. Today, we’re now hearing that he’s relying on a meeting that Donald Trump is brokering with the extremists in the House Freedom Caucus._ ** _Yes, for the first time in 100 years, a member of the majority standing for election to be Speaker of the House was rejected by their own party. Right after the vote, Marjorie Taylor Greene, who McCarthy bribed to vocally support him by promising to put her back on her committees--Jewish lasers be damned!--attacked her erstwhile pals on the radical right who voted against McCarthy, such as Matt Gaetz and Lauren Boebert. _ **_It truly is chaos for the House GOP. But, the Democrats?_**
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdb75546c-ca12-44a8-82f7-ac07e7ff255e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| **_New Leader Rep. Hakeem Jeffries held the Democratic Caucus together, allowing us to attack the corrupt GOP clown-show today from a position of unity. He's showing Americans how an adult party looks, is putting Dems in position to reject GOP radicalism and even has a chance of making someone a speaker who supports abortion rights, Social Security, gun safety and other issues we care about._** [**_Jeffries will need our support to continue effectively fighting GOP seditionists. Will you join us to give new Democratic Leader, Hakeem Jeffries, $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can afford for the battle?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T45bfafbd-c262-4d50-b1f4-ce8eeba41e86/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thanks for making this an even better day for Democrats and democracy, Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T38644682-9e65-4f7b-82eb-c1800f6cb7b6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

Peter, yesterday, I expected to be sworn in to the House of Representatives.

**Instead, I watched in utter disbelief as the GOP clown show imploded.**

_For the first time in exactly 100 years, the US House is without a Speaker, because the GOP can’t even pick their own leader._

Peter, we knew a MAGA majority would be bad. But no one could have guessed it would be this bad.

**They have no policy agenda. They have no vision. They have no leadership. They cannot serve the American people.**

[**Peter, now is a critical opportunity to prove our strength and unity. I’m looking for a surge of 300 grassroots donations by midnight to show that Democrats are the true leaders of this country. name: Your America
subject: Reserve your DVD box set
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read. [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7767%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=JMiZrU8%2fspptCKam9KQEvQ&sysid=1)

| | | This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c90830%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=XqxrJWmIuN8GqIVoDkxFIQ&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That’s why we produced “[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c90831%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=JalZ9KZ%2byn5J4a6JFzgcCw&sysid=1)” which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c90832%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6oUnwkLJp9lo0xYv1cyIMw&sysid=1)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis’s profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis’s The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis’s Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis’s beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis’s own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That’s why I hope you’ll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c90833%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=JBt2vDZDCQGXXs3QaEcuiw&sysid=1).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7767%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=JMiZrU8%2fspptCKam9KQEvQ&sysid=1)_

name: Greg Casar
subject: Let me explain
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GREG CASAR FOR CONGRESS
body:
They stand divided while trying to divide Americans at every turn.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56877996/386270293/1120393829?refcode=em-wrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZWMwMDRlMC01YzhjLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FyEvLT7ivRR-vPKsBVmdOp9aZ770TE0U9cbpQIsgATQ=&emci=21872a78-5c8c-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=8ec004e0-5c8c-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=6830379)
The Republican dysfunction and extremism speaks for itself, Peter. Here’s why I haven’t been sworn in yet.
Yesterday, after three rounds of votes, the extreme right wing could not come to an agreement on who should become the next Speaker of the House — shutting down Congress _on opening day_. **Without a Speaker, no one gets sworn in. The last time this happened was 100 years ago in 1923.**
**If this is a sign of how a Republican-controlled House will function in this next year, then we have our work cut out for us.[Will you chip in $5 today to help us make sure we’re ready to fight for constituents, regardless of whatever breakdown the GOP will have next?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56878000/386270295/37284288?refcode=em-20230104&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZWMwMDRlMC01YzhjLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FyEvLT7ivRR-vPKsBVmdOp9aZ770TE0U9cbpQIsgATQ=)**
****[Chip In »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56878005/386270299/-1098251101?refcode=em-20230104&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZWMwMDRlMC01YzhjLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FyEvLT7ivRR-vPKsBVmdOp9aZ770TE0U9cbpQIsgATQ=)****
---
Until the GOP elects a Speaker, no members can be sworn in. No laws can be passed. And over 331 million people living in the U.S. today have no functioning representation working on their behalf — the job we were elected to do.
This is not just a tactic, Peter. Stopping governance and incapacitating the federal government is their ultimate goal, halting progressive policies and failing the working people of our country.
While it was strange and disappointing to not officially be sworn in yesterday, I haven’t lost focus.**I am here to serve our constituents and to support working Texans.**
[**Will you chip in and support my work today to continue to coordinate and align other progressive members and keep our elected leaders working together for the good of our communities?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56878008/386270302/-1098251101?refcode=em-20230104&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZWMwMDRlMC01YzhjLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FyEvLT7ivRR-vPKsBVmdOp9aZ770TE0U9cbpQIsgATQ=)
Together, I know that we can make our government work for working people.
Thank you,
Greg
_Greg Casar
Congressman-Elect (Still)
Texas Congressional District 35_

clean_body: They stand divided while trying to divide Americans at every turn. The Republican dysfunction and extremism speaks for itself, Peter. Here’s why I haven’t been sworn in yet. Yesterday, after three rounds of votes, the extreme right wing could not come to an agreement on who should become the next Speaker of the House — shutting down Congress on opening day. Without a Speaker, no one gets sworn in. The last time this happened was 100 years ago in 1923. If this is a sign of how a Republican-controlled House will function in this next year, then we have our work cut out for us.= **= Until the GOP elects a Speaker, no members can be sworn in. No laws can be passed. And over 331 million people living in the U.S. today have no functioning representation working on their behalf — the job we were elected to do. This is not just a tactic, Peter. Stopping governance and incapacitating the federal government is their ultimate goal, halting progressive policies and failing the working people of our country. While it was strange and disappointing to not officially be sworn in yesterday, I haven’t lost focus.I am here to serve our constituents and to support working Texans. = Together, I know that we can make our government work for working people. Thank you, Greg Greg Casar Congressman-Elect (Still) Texas Congressional District 35 ****=** | ****** ---|---

Friend, if I've EVER needed your immediate attention - it's now.

| | | After 3 rounds of votes yesterday on the House floor, Kevin McCarthy failed to secure enough votes from Republicans to become Speaker of the House, delaying the swearing in of the new Congress and plunging the GOP into full-on chaos. The spectacle continues today, and McCarthy only has himself to blame. For years, Kevin McCarthy enabled and empowered the nuttiest nuts of the Republican party. He refused to stand up to them, embraced their craziest conspiracy theories, and helped elect their wackiest wackos. And after he briefly showed a spine following the attack on the Capitol, he backed off his criticism of Trump, and flew down to Mar-a-Lago to prostrate himself and beg forgiveness. And now it's come back to bite him. And he's earned every bit of it. [So please join us, add your name, and tell Kevin McCarthy: HA HA HA HA!!!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2b03209e-102f-4840-a2a1-e5a20ee55458/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Deroy Murdock
subject: Access “C.S. Lewis on Christianity”
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivatin

| | | This sponsored message from Deroy Murdock is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z69betjj4aaurle44trg240o8s4lvpbjspofm7g8_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c3imeo34cph2bs)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z0c5urpebh1fivv2671uie0qlses864mtlcbn8jo_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c3imeo34cph2bs)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zp7cnr75tl67603u9fegfeej9ic7pefuraeljgko_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c3imeo34cph2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zkvkefs9udqiuc3d19vtc137kbv0osm49nvjuddg_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c3imeo34cph2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---
