name: Alliance Defending Freedom
subject: Sign the pro-life pledge now
body:
Are you still devoted to the fight for life? Sign the Pledge today!
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.readactnews.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiOTgzNjUxNjA3IiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjMwMDQtYmYzMmQwZTU0MDUwNDc4ZmJjMmM2M2QyMTQ1NmJkZGEiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMCIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vcHhsLmlzdC93bDNzb3Z5MnFuP3NyYz1SQU5PMzM5OTMifQ/m5htc-so8OMQJ0uXbMuIAw)
---
Fellow Pro-Life American, The recent overturning of the disastrous _Roe v. Wade_ decision that enabled the killing of over 60 million babies was a blessing from God - one of the most amazing victories for biblical values in our lifetime. We at ADF are proud to be a part of the legal team that secured this historic, generational win - a victory only made possible by the prayerful and generous support of friends just like you! But as you and I both know, the recent decision in _Dobbs v. Jackson Women's Health Organization_ did not mark the end of abortion in America. Far from it, in fact. **Unfortunately, it seems that many pro-life Americans believe that the fight has been won and may have disengaged from the cause.** I urge you, friend - don't give into that temptation! The war for the rights of the unborn and the protection of their mothers has just begun. As we continue into the next phase of the fight, can I count on your commitment to this movement until abortion is eradicated in America once and for all? [**If your answer is "YES," will you please join thousands of your fellow Americans in signing this national pledge of support for the pro-life cause?**](http://trk.readactnews.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiOTgzNjUxNjA3IiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjMwMDQtYmYzMmQwZTU0MDUwNDc4ZmJjMmM2M2QyMTQ1NmJkZGEiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMSIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vcHhsLmlzdC93bDNzb3Z5MnFuP3NyYz1SQU5PMzM5OTMifQ/QZBxHjRTzFkxwq5kf1AGuw)
---
[**Sign the Pro-Life Pledge**](http://trk.readactnews.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiOTgzNjUxNjA3IiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjMwMDQtYmYzMmQwZTU0MDUwNDc4ZmJjMmM2M2QyMTQ1NmJkZGEiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMiIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vcHhsLmlzdC93bDNzb3Z5MnFuP3NyYz1SQU5PMzM5OTMifQ/UgTqgY4RSdjVugi3LTPpEw)
---
**When you reaffirm your commitment, we'll immediately give you access to ADF's widely popular digital guide,_Critical Conversations: LIFE - 3 Myths and 3 Facts_ , at no cost!** This powerful resource will equip you with the knowledge and confidence you need to respectfully but convincingly defend the pro-life position in this new post-_Roe_ age, whether you're engaging with family, friends, coworkers, or complete strangers. And as you and I both know, those conversations are only going to become more common - and more contentious. The leftist media and their allies in the pro-abortion movement have treated the _Dobbs_ decision like it's the end of the road for abortion. It seems like nearly every day that we hear another story of activists hysterically protesting, committing acts of violence, lobbing threats at crisis pregnancy centers, or worse. There can be no doubt about it - the pro-abortion activists haven't abandoned this battle. They've doubled down. [**We need to do the same. Will you let me know that you're still praying, working, and interceding for the right to life by signing ADF's Pro-Life Pledge right now?**](http://trk.readactnews.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiOTgzNjUxNjA3IiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjMwMDQtYmYzMmQwZTU0MDUwNDc4ZmJjMmM2M2QyMTQ1NmJkZGEiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMyIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vcHhsLmlzdC93bDNzb3Z5MnFuP3NyYz1SQU5PMzM5OTMifQ/2UtCY52lDplN583jqcZEhA) The pro-abortion activists would love nothing more than for the pro-life movement to rest on our laurels and consider our work done. That's why we must continue praying, acting, and speaking out to defend the thousands of innocent, pre-born children who are victims of abortion every day, until the very last one is saved. Every step of the way, you can count on ADF to lead on the legal front. Our attorneys are the tip of the spear in numerous pro-life legal efforts all across the country, including:
* **ADF has litigated dozens of cases against Planned Parenthood** -several implicating Planned Parenthood affiliates for millions in taxpayer fraud.

* **Multiple cases that will protect vulnerable women.** These cases will ensure that mothers have the right to know the truth about abortion and that abortionists follow basic health and safety laws

* **Cases that will protect the conscience rights of healthcare workers** and the free speech rights of pro-life advocates.

In each of these battles, the prayerful and generous support of friends just like you make all the difference. Can I count on you to stand with us once again as we enter this new chapter of the movement to end abortion and defend the sanctity of life? [**Please sign the declaration here. Remember - when you sign, you'll immediately get access to our popular digital guide,_Critical Conversations: LIFE - 3 Myths and 3 Facts_ , at no cost****!**](http://trk.readactnews.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiOTgzNjUxNjA3IiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjMwMDQtYmYzMmQwZTU0MDUwNDc4ZmJjMmM2M2QyMTQ1NmJkZGEiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiNCIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vcHhsLmlzdC93bDNzb3Z5MnFuP3NyYz1SQU5PMzM5OTMifQ/GchehcSaQ1y9uUfrqRSlcQ)
---
[**Sign the Pro-Life Pledge**](http://trk.readactnews.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiOTgzNjUxNjA3IiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjMwMDQtYmYzMmQwZTU0MDUwNDc4ZmJjMmM2M2QyMTQ1NmJkZGEiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiNSIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vcHhsLmlzdC93bDNzb3Z5MnFuP3NyYz1SQU5PMzM5OTMifQ/LXGVeRufblULSzC2iwg7oA)
---
Thank you, and God bless you! For life, Alliance Defending Freedom

subject: We need to know...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Miller-Meeks for Congress
body:
| [](http://links.drmillermeeks.com/u/click?_t=a0459abfcdbb4d8889670e005e3f851c&_m=47f49b4218bc41c5b0d0132e1b6a287d&_e=W_AXojj4nBP9qi1SbB-kBuL7j5Gk6Rg-TVPKeNRQpouSZVEvH5vJZL_Nh2n_MFpM15dFYOZAWY9IoiNzOzyQy3bV6-jciW6zSYTkpU-e9zkMkRphQwAaHXPq3-_-P8LldVM1CXdF6k866MIuifJNX_AiKVQgzfIKkG6NDjTy-knm0ubHs65TxI-neLg9pwq0Eud4q_saE_sm0PO_Id_jOunXtqNgVn-hM6ZAUJShtSZat8vY2cv73ZLFU7Uu-vo6806S9p267rGr4KFr1DNj1XjVzREA6uaZbfJXoJ-T_HaOnik4xqYQbdQLHxZNtQgT491bgbdh1IMIu4m9VoCGtjuu6HeD97Ru-xfS0u_NAi_uGExsqx6OD_YjqruOE_hy8E2THxBfDlVqoA6XL0lK0yn8jdoFVvWFUCxqA7Hu-jvme9o5B75xKna4u8tbuzTdYs0jGwGZx60Q9iGvhx-Nfq6o5L56cU2RvMxG3wLkMy0%3D)
---

Friend,

The reason I ran for office in the first place was to represent the people of Iowa and to try and solve issues to the best of my ability.

We’ve got more issues than you can shake a stick at going on in our country right now. I don’t want to take up too much of your time, but I would love to know which is most important to you.

So, if you could, would you mind taking the one question survey below to let me know what issue is most important to you, and what issue I should focus my efforts on **IMMEDIATELY?**

name: Martin Heinrich
subject: Will you share your priorities?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
body:
I hope you’ll take a moment to share what’s on your mind. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56891759/386278728/-272948131?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20230104_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYTI2MjVkZi02NzhjLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RYiPNW1CRPsGG35i6SFD2IpMSqaTF5Mqp6bC60HQObg=&emci=5dc14e69-5b8c-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=1a2625df-678c-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=252045)
---
The new year is officially here, folks. It’s time to get to work with our newly expanded Democratic Senate majority. We’ve accomplished a lot since we flipped the Senate in 2020 — from cutting everyday costs and taking on climate change with the _Inflation Reduction Act_ to protecting same-sex and interracial marriages with the _Respect for Marriage Act._ There’s a lot to be proud of — but there’s still so much more work to be done. My highest priority will always be delivering results for New Mexicans and folks across the country. That’s why, this year, I’m focused on making key investments in education, defending reproductive rights, preserving our public lands and waters, and more. [**But I want to make sure I get the chance to hear from you about your priorities for the year ahead, too. Will you take just a few minutes to tell me a little bit about what issues you want to be tackled most in 2023? subject: Solidarity Strategies Announces Public Affairs Division
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/unidosusaf/solidarity-strategies-announces-public-affairs-division?e=b8f90417f9)
---
---
| |
---
Solidarity Strategies is one of the nation’s largest Latino-owned and operated award-winning political and public affairs consulting firms in Washington, D.C. We provide marketing and strategic services to an array of political, nonprofit, and corporate clients. After our most successful year, we expanded to offer new services to best serve our clients. With much excitement, we are extremely proud to launch our new public affairs division.
Some services to name a few include:
**CONGRESSIONAL HISPANIC CAUCUS RELATIONS MANAGEMENT**
* With over 35 years of experience in helping expand the Congressional Hispanic Caucus, our staff can foster and maintain strong relationships between members of Congress and individual stakeholders, community organizations, associations, and more.

**STRATEGIC PARTNERSHIP**
* Through market mapping and landscape analyses, Solidarity Strategies supports individuals and groups seeking to build relationships with local, state, and national movers and shakers in addition to corporations, associations, and non-profit organizations nationwide.

**EVENT MANAGEMENT**
* No matter where you are in your event planning, Solidarity Strategies can assist with the creation and development of small or large-scale personal, community, political, and corporate events, conferences, ceremonies, and conventions.

For a full list of our public affair services contact us at our firm’s email at [**info@solidaritystrategies.com**](mailto:info@soidaritystrategies.com)**or visit our new website** ,****[**www.solidaritystrategies.com**](https://solidaritystrategies.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=985fddf6f660c0281e297f819&id=d4c5287fa6&e=b8f90417f9)**.**
We look forward to working with you!
Best,_The Solidarity Strategies Team_
| | | | | | [](https://solidaritystrategies.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=985fddf6f660c0281e297f819&id=1018d1f8e0&e=b8f90417f9)| [](https://solidaritystrategies.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=985fddf6f660c0281e297f819&id=5965020de3&e=b8f90417f9)| [](https://solidaritystrategies.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=985fddf6f660c0281e297f819&id=588d7af9ad&e=b8f90417f9)
---|---|---

name: Jim Jordan
subject: 2023 Congressional Survey
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62159717:6LJgLvGkN:m:1:3331421248:38624EC4E834A2F48F9410869D1C1056:r)
|

Peter,

As Nancy Pelosi relinquishes her speaker's gavel, House Republicans will have the opportunity to show the American people a better vision for our great country that includes:

* ...a vibrant and growing private sector economy,
* ...able-bodied people working,
* ...more domestic energy production and lower gas prices,
* ...a smaller and more accountable federal government, and
* ...restored respect around the world from allies and enemies alike!

Yes, we will still have big spenders in the White House and in charge of the U.S. Senate, but I intend to help lead the charge in the House in changing the direction of our country.

I'm sure you remember from civics class that the House of Representatives holds the federal purse strings. Republicans pledge to take measures to stop the wasteful spending that sparked the inflation crisis. **Our top priority must be to reverse the failed liberal agenda of sending government checks to able-bodied people for not working**.

Republicans will pave the way for renewed domestic energy production, even a return to energy independence, marking a sharp turn from the failed Biden/Pelosi policies.

**Perhaps most importantly,** we will bring much-needed accountability to bureaucrats like Fauci, Mayorkas, and the whole cast of characters behind the waste, fraud and corruption of the Biden Administration. **I am so energized to embark on this bold mission!**

As we prepare to take control, **[I wanted hear what YOU think the priorities for the next Congress should be.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62159718:6LJgLvGkN:m:1:3331421248:38624EC4E834A2F48F9410869D1C1056:r)** There is no doubt in my mind that every good policy we propose will come under relentless attack by Democrats and the mainstream media, so I want to be sure that as we move forward, we are doing right by trusted patriots such as yourself.

Would you mind taking a moment to**[complete the survey linked below](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62159718:6LJgLvGkN:m:1:3331421248:38624EC4E834A2F48F9410869D1C1056:r)** and letting me know what you think about our 2023 Congressional Priorities?
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62159718:6LJgLvGkN:m:1:3331421248:38624EC4E834A2F48F9410869D1C1056:r)

[**TAKE OUR 2023 CONGRESSIONAL SURVEY
RESPOND NOW -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62159718:6LJgLvGkN:m:1:3331421248:38624EC4E834A2F48F9410869D1C1056:r)

God Bless,
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62159718:6LJgLvGkN:m:1:3331421248:38624EC4E834A2F48F9410869D1C1056:r)
Jim Jordan

P.S. Democrats have done immense damage to this country in the past 24 months, and we are going to be working tirelessly to clean up their mess. Our job is clear, and our vision is strong, but we want to make sure we know YOUR priorities by taking our **[2023 Congressional Survey today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62159718:6LJgLvGkN:m:1:3331421248:38624EC4E834A2F48F9410869D1C1056:r)**

**About Jim Jordan:** | Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable.

**
In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio.

clean_body: | Peter, As Nancy Pelosi relinquishes her speaker's gavel, House Republicans will have the opportunity to show the American people a better vision for our great country that includes: ...a vibrant and growing private sector economy, ...able-bodied people working, ...more domestic energy production and lower gas prices, ...a smaller and more accountable federal government, and ...restored respect around the world from allies and enemies alike! Yes, we will still have big spenders in the White House and in charge of the U.S. Senate, but I intend to help lead the charge in the House in changing the direction of our country. I'm sure you remember from civics class that the House of Representatives holds the federal purse strings. Republicans pledge to take measures to stop the wasteful spending that sparked the inflation crisis. Our top priority must be to reverse the failed liberal agenda of sending government checks to able-bodied people for not working. Republicans will pave the way for renewed domestic energy production, even a return to energy independence, marking a sharp turn from the failed Biden/Pelosi policies. Perhaps most importantly, we will bring much-needed accountability to bureaucrats like Fauci, Mayorkas, and the whole cast of characters behind the waste, fraud and corruption of the Biden Administration. I am so energized to embark on this bold mission! As we prepare to take control, There is no doubt in my mind that every good policy we propose will come under relentless attack by Democrats and the mainstream media, so I want to be sure that as we move forward, we are doing right by trusted patriots such as yourself. Would you mind taking a moment to and letting me know what you think about our 2023 Congressional Priorities? God Bless, Jim Jordan P.S. Democrats have done immense damage to this country in the past 24 months, and we are going to be working tirelessly to clean up their mess. Our job is clear, and our vision is strong, but we want to make sure we know YOUR priorities by taking our About Jim Jordan: | Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable. In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate. As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending. He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. name: Supreme Court Update (via DLCC.org)
subject: Do you think SCOTUS should be expanded?
body:
| | |
---
| | Last month, SCOTUS heard oral arguments in _Moore v. Harper_ , a case that could give state legislators near-total power over federal elections.**And, from overturning _Roe v. Wade_ to harming the EPA’s ability to fight climate change, it’s clear that the Supreme Court’s rulings don’t reflect what the majority of Americans want. ** One proposed solution from Congressional Democrats is to expand the Supreme Court. But increasing the number of justices on the court is controversial, so we are polling our supporters to see what local Democrats think about it. body:
We MUST stop them NOW:
| | | **BREAKING: The GOP is in CHAOS as House Speaker vote DEADLOCKS!**

Peter, with 2022 all wrapped up and 2023 here, we wanted to take a second and remember everything that happened last year. There was [**no shortage of terrible Democrat takes**](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=54b0be806ff444a3b68d2c8c2bc9d880&_e=f-n7-L6c0xyzroggA1Ku-k7O_4pozO27JLYVRMYfKSqVPhLIi-SHGpPS7SmHO-8tZlknG0GnVHV7c3cYo0-ZKhhcN2iZlijQ0Qxb5yHcLIk6jcAZ92xQirdFO5KpLrWHq9uSWWQKcyviJa-Xy2nZazvQXGXdh-MTdiHduOkNWvJGadJOh3KlUJkpgo0eWKTti-6y64jT8UvV1hGvhzdhsIGUrTaAWMn78pDJXCIh9oHq6JABjkUOhaLbXO3mH8e2dII6kDoPcbTBbE7Bsc1ycaII0JTWoDoFBKYc1aLUpkFz7JwoCdMnXt3xUEpHZ4a3cA8lwHrVY_Nu1u4f_8UvAOaHfBN-N-iW2x1DAW-zGluQ7VVQ4GILbdQRDVH3LAF25Vchm-xXHzG1JtiU3hWp8OAfR7uwKayM4YzoBWmPez1e7YFM_hIy5x9DF7o_ele0lkSvpp_TXoQAR7t2HajpNLj4S8JoZHYUWfuAar5hv0U%3D) and statements, but we sorted through them and found what we think are truly the **Top 3 Worst Democrat Takes of 2022** _. _
Take a look and let us know what you think deserves _the worst take of the year._

I’m truly honored to continue working for you, friend.| | | [](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=dc4dcbd93a01423b90d4dcf7df88d9ae&_e=RzGE0Fx0w-1vUXztT9IofLFAIOuSgMw6YJ822jF78ux_J3eCd72d7eO8Hl4UKyG2PV0pncjbeTVK911SpNcvLnTyOC0t7NZD8z76GC9u80dqBRj6hRGctYOVJS-a454QRxqPAt0QEIisPMtOi-FNndhVVs4FpwASAeBcEuaVJRqmX67SXIRB5rxOhgHnYKIC6ZcGLVrhKm5t9sX-fZ_AlDDBIHt5WSPfzwkY1EFOCiVrC3eeFxWoee9ezmKd482fIOGFxcSd-wPokdeZL2OHk92ESm0uqhsyblNZh_Yit_FYI8WyX6YX2Byy4N8rvLjGF3-9vvrQtjeDVaXq6ko0cLOpiGOsbKfUD_d4uuftioZR9Li86mEPbimORdjX7GDGkkcGiT13Ny3kMukPDsfw_Q%3D%3D)
---
Friend, I’m excited to continue my work in the 118th Congress on behalf of the hard-working men and women in Illinois’ 16th Congressional District. We face many challenges, including rising costs and inflation, foreign energy dependence, increasing violent crime, and protecting our agriculture sector in Illinois. My goal over the next two years is to utilize my positions on the Ways and Means and Intelligence Committees to advance conservative policies and address America’s biggest challenges. It truly is my privilege to serve in Congress. Sincerely,
---

subject: The Food Crisis of 2023
body:
We live in uncertain times. There are currently 38 million Americans, including 12 million children, who are struggling with fo
# The Food Crisis of 2023
We live in uncertain times. There are currently 38 million Americans, including 12 million children, who are struggling with food insecurity. As inflation and supply chain disruptions continue to push food costs higher and higher, families are feeling the weight of financial distress as they struggle to make ends meet. John Boyd Jr., a fourth-generation farmer, warns that food shortages are coming. "For so long, we've enjoyed lots of food in this country, so we've never ever faced a food shortage. The worst is yet to come." **Leading industry sources are worried about food shortages. Experts say more grocery hoarding may come as disruptions push America's food supply "near its breaking point".** As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever. If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to be hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

Well, no need to worry anymore... Obviously, waiting on the government for a handout in a disaster just isn't an option. And we were completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of the best-selling [**4Patriots Survival Food Kits**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z5cbsgt8j9o1gkmbhmbikn2c25uqh6ie1gu1atr0_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c3hm6oj4c3h2bs). Currently the 4Patriots Survival Food Kits are flying off the shelves because:
* **4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value.** This is _not_ ordinary food. This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are.
* There's no fancy packaging, it's sturdy, triple-layer stuff and can stand up to most of the crazy things that happen in a crisis. This food **is designed to last for 25 years** , so you have complete peace of mind for the long term. And they're using compact kits so you can store them anywhere in your house without any extra hassle. They're sturdy, water-resistant and stack easily. And extremely covert too.
* You can make these meals in less than 20 minutes. Just add boiling water, simmer, and serve.
* **Customers rave about the delicious flavor of this food - it doesn't taste like "survival food."** And you get a whole slew of choices for breakfast, lunch and dinner so you don't get stuck eating the same thing day-in and day-out.
* **You get an easy, no nonsense monthly payment plan with no interest!**

And that's not all, because... [**You also get $318 worth of FREE gifts!**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zk47p4frtfmohbtmcq9t7p6ikgf7dtmoc6mrc7b0_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c3hm6oj4c3h2bs) **FREE Bonus #1:** because they are so popular and a true foundation for your preparedness plan, they're going to give you _**2**_ of their popular 72-Hour Survival Food Kits when you get your 3-Month Kit today. That's extra meals (on the house), grab-and-go portability and a way to get through a short-term crisis without even breaking into your stash. **People love these kits.** It's one of the top-rated items on our website. And you get... **FREE Bonus #2:** You'll get a **Victory Garden Survival Seed Vault** with thousands of non-GMO heirloom seeds inside, designed to stay fresh for years. You can harvest and replant them over and over again. **FREE Bonus #3:** You also get their **Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater.** With your Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater, you can boil water without fuel, flames, smoke or noise. Use your Sun Kettle to purify water, cook food, wash up, clean up and much more. It's like having a mini-microwave the size of a thermos. **FREE Bonus #4:** You'll also get an **Exclusive Ultimate Survival Digital Library.** With these 4 digital books, you'll have the information and tips to help you prepare for an emergency. Together, these digital books are valued at $20, but they're yours free as a thank you for your order. But that's not all because you also get... **FREE Bonus #5:** You also get their **Digital Meal Planning & Recipe Guide**. Inside, you'll find easy ways to whip up delicious meals you'd be proud to serve your kids, and you'll get this brand NEW report for FREE. **FREE Bonus #6:** You also get **Freedom Joe's Survival Coffee.** Rich, aromatic coffee designed to last 25 years. Coffee is one of the most in-demand items when the "you-know-what" hits the fan. Stay alert when the going gets tough with a cup of premium survival coffee from 100% pure Arabica beans. You get 30 servings of delicious, aromatic survival coffee added to your Kit. **FREE Bonus #7:** You also get **Bugle Boy Survival Cocoa.** Warm up with each cup of chocolatey goodness that is sure to satisfy the young and the young at heart. With your Survival Cocoa Kits, you'll have the satisfying comfort of a steaming cup of cocoa when you and your loved ones need it most. You'll get 14 servings of this taste-tested hot cocoa FREE for arming yourself with survival food. But we're still not done, because you also get... **FREE Bonus #8:** You also get **$25 OFF your next purchase.** This is FREE money in the bank for you. You get $25 off any future purchase of $100 or more. Use it to get whatever you need to round out your preparedness plan... best-selling survival food, solar gadgets and so much more! It's completely up to you. That's what we call an incredible deal. But we want to sweeten the pot. So when you order your 3-Month Survival Food Kit today, you also get... **FREE Bonus #9:** **You get FREE Shipping and Handling on your entire order!** It's not cheap to ship 688 servings of food in two totes (plus all the FREE gifts you're getting). But you deserve it for becoming a loyal customer. And frankly, we want to do it for you. [**Get Your 4Patriots Survival Food Kits Rushed To You Plus All Your FREE Bonuses While Supplies Last!**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zb1puiqvl5o0frsherhogh5q800fk6k5fdsrrld0_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c3hm6oj4c3h2bs) Isn't that great? The best part is... You'll have the peace of mind and security that comes from having your very own survival food stockpile. On great-tasting, survival food protection without the sticker shock. **Look, this food tastes homemade.** It's built to last the long haul. It's a snap to prepare. And everyone from former Navy SEALs to middle-American grandmas are singing its praises. [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zdvb8ti1oic48u2ifrh9jct073hkc53eulg6bnv8_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c3hm6oj4c3h2bs) You need to get 'er done today. Why? Because if you don't [**take action**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z35s2inec85povno33tr0094usdm27qhjf9uungg_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c3hm6oj4c3h2bs) to get your food stockpile today, you'll be in the same boat as the brainwashed masses who think "everything is fine." And if a crisis hits and your family asks, "What are we going to eat?" your mouth will go dry, and you'll feel powerless. But what if you decide to secure your food stockpile instead? Just [**imagine how much better you'll feel right away**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zss859auflj32bmlpnme3gfototk9gsjcfvn6rio_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c3hm6oj4c3h2bs). When a crisis hits, you will be able to calmly reassure them that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. Listen, I can't predict the future. I don't know exactly when or how a crisis will hit. **As it stands today, it's every man for himself.** In a crisis, the loss will be beyond what you can imagine. That's why I want you to have the same peace of mind that I do. [**Get Your 4Patriots Survival Food Kits Rushed To You Plus All Your FREE Bonuses While Supplies Last!**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z1v6h1sdfs7bm9l0okcp7t5qjpktrs2b3gkcm0og_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c3hm6oj4c3h2bs) To your survival,

Frank Bates
Patriot Headquarters **More Raving Reviews From Customers!** | | **Rory H.** I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things.
---|---
| **Billy H.** Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup.
---|---
| **Kevin S.** The 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start.
---|---
| **Carol B.** I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings.
---|---
| **Ken K.** I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal.
---|---
| **Justin A.** My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great.
---|---
| **Gary M.** I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. clean_body: We live in uncertain times. There are currently 38 million Americans, including 12 million children, who are struggling with fo The Food Crisis of 2023 We live in uncertain times. There are currently 38 million Americans, including 12 million children, who are struggling with food insecurity. As inflation and supply chain disruptions continue to push food costs higher and higher, families are feeling the weight of financial distress as they struggle to make ends meet. John Boyd Jr., a fourth-generation farmer, warns that food shortages are coming. "For so long, we've enjoyed lots of food in this country, so we've never ever faced a food shortage. The worst is yet to come." Leading industry sources are worried about food shortages. Experts say more grocery hoarding may come as disruptions push America's food supply "near its breaking point". As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever. If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to be hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like... Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired... Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick... Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished... Well, no need to worry anymore... Obviously, waiting on the government for a handout in a disaster just isn't an option. And we were completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of the best-selling . Currently the 4Patriots Survival Food Kits are flying off the shelves because: 4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value. This is not ordinary food. This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are. There's no fancy packaging, it's sturdy, triple-layer stuff and can stand up to most of the crazy things that happen in a crisis. This food is designed to last for 25 years , so you have complete peace of mind for the long term. And they're using compact kits so you can store them anywhere in your house without any extra hassle. They're sturdy, water-resistant and stack easily. And extremely covert too. You can make these meals in less than 20 minutes. Just add boiling water, simmer, and serve. Customers rave about the delicious flavor of this food - it doesn't taste like "survival food." And you get a whole slew of choices for breakfast, lunch and dinner so you don't get stuck eating the same thing day-in and day-out. You get an easy, no nonsense monthly payment plan with no interest! And that's not all, because... FREE Bonus #1: because they are so popular and a true foundation for your preparedness plan, they're going to give you 2 of their popular 72-Hour Survival Food Kits when you get your 3-Month Kit today. That's extra meals (on the house), grab-and-go portability and a way to get through a short-term crisis without even breaking into your stash. People love these kits. It's one of the top-rated items on our website. And you get... FREE Bonus #2: You'll get a Victory Garden Survival Seed Vault with thousands of non-GMO heirloom seeds inside, designed to stay fresh for years. You can harvest and replant them over and over again. FREE Bonus #3: You also get their Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater. With your Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater, you can boil water without fuel, flames, smoke or noise. Use your Sun Kettle to purify water, cook food, wash up, clean up and much more. It's like having a mini-microwave the size of a thermos. FREE Bonus #4: You'll also get an Exclusive Ultimate Survival Digital Library. With these 4 digital books, you'll have the information and tips to help you prepare for an emergency. Together, these digital books are valued at $20, but they're yours free as a thank you for your order. But that's not all because you also get... FREE Bonus #5: You also get their Digital Meal Planning & Recipe Guide. Inside, you'll find easy ways to whip up delicious meals you'd be proud to serve your kids, and you'll get this brand NEW report for FREE. FREE Bonus #6: You also get Freedom Joe's Survival Coffee. Rich, aromatic coffee designed to last 25 years. Coffee is one of the most in-demand items when the "you-know-what" hits the fan. Stay alert when the going gets tough with a cup of premium survival coffee from 100% pure Arabica beans. You get 30 servings of delicious, aromatic survival coffee added to your Kit. FREE Bonus #7: You also get Bugle Boy Survival Cocoa. Warm up with each cup of chocolatey goodness that is sure to satisfy the young and the young at heart. With your Survival Cocoa Kits, you'll have the satisfying comfort of a steaming cup of cocoa when you and your loved ones need it most. You'll get 14 servings of this taste-tested hot cocoa FREE for arming yourself with survival food. But we're still not done, because you also get... FREE Bonus #8: You also get $25 OFF your next purchase. This is FREE money in the bank for you. You get $25 off any future purchase of $100 or more. Use it to get whatever you need to round out your preparedness plan... best-selling survival food, solar gadgets and so much more! It's completely up to you. That's what we call an incredible deal. Isn't that great? The best part is... You'll have the peace of mind and security that comes from having your very own survival food stockpile. On great-tasting, survival food protection without the sticker shock. Look, this food tastes homemade. It's built to last the long haul. It's a snap to prepare. And everyone from former Navy SEALs to middle-American grandmas are singing its praises. You need to get 'er done today. Why? subject: Speaker Vote
body:
| | | [](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=65593c72af&e=fdefed58de)
---
Peter,I just voted for Jim Jordan to be Speaker of the House.

We need a Speaker who will unite Republicans on border security, energy security, debt reduction, term limits and earmarks, among other important issues. These are key issues I was elected to fight for, so I voted for a Speaker who will do the same.

Yesterday, the Freedom Caucus presented a fair deal to Kevin McCarthy that would have made him Speaker on the first vote, but he eagerly rejected it. Perhaps he will reconsider. There's nothing more that I want than a united Republican party that fights for its citizens.

The bottom line is that Washington is broken and it's destroying America -- we cannot keep doing the same thing and expect different results. That's insanity.

I will always put conservative principles, my constituents and the American people first. We have to reject the Swamp way of doing things or nothing will ever change!

[Will you stand with us to help fight the status quo in Washington? Please chip in $10, $25, $50, $100 or more now.](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=c793e184d2&e=fdefed58de)

This fight is ongoing, but rest assured I will keep working hard in my next term to do what's right and try to save our country.

[Please chip in here to help us stand for conservative principles!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=459a2d76d3&e=fdefed58de)

Thank you and God bless!

[](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=a12344fa1f&e=fdefed58de)

name: BREAKING (via VPP)
subject: still no Speaker of the House?!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Republicans FAILED
| | _**BREAKING:**_
US House to resume vote for Speaker at 12 PM EST after Republicans failed to elect new leadership
---
This is the first time in over 100 years the House has been unable to elect a Speaker on the first day. Republicans are in shambles!

_We’re beaming, but we know Kevin McCarthy is FURIOUS._ Due to this stunning turn of events, we’re conducting an urgent poll for top Democrats:

[Who do you think should become Speaker of the House?](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/speaker-poll/?source=VPP_20230104_EMPOLL_E2_T0_AC&t=6&akid=5956%2E878179%2E_ldKMK)
[HAKEEM JEFFRIES »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/speaker-poll/?source=VPP_20230104_EMPOLL_E2_T0_AC&t=7&akid=5956%2E878179%2E_ldKMK)
---
[KEVIN MCCARTHY »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/speaker-poll/?source=VPP_20230104_EMPOLL_E2_T0_AC&t=8&akid=5956%2E878179%2E_ldKMK)
[SOMEONE ELSE »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/speaker-poll/?source=VPP_20230104_EMPOLL_E2_T0_AC&t=9&akid=5956%2E878179%2E_ldKMK)
[I DON'T KNOW »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/speaker-poll/?source=VPP_20230104_EMPOLL_E2_T0_AC&t=10&akid=5956%2E878179%2E_ldKMK)
**Republicans spent all day yesterday fighting amongst themselves... _and they FAILED to elect a new Speaker!_**

This is one of the _most important_ votes our new, divided Congress will cast.

**_IF_** Republicans stay divided, Hakeem Jeffries could overcome the MAGA caucus and win!

**_BUT IF_** Republicans get their act together, we could get Kevin McCarthy... _or worse!_
[So we need to know now: Who do you think should become Speaker of the House?](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/speaker-poll/?source=VPP_20230104_EMPOLL_E2_T0_AC&t=11&akid=5956%2E878179%2E_ldKMK)
[HAKEEM JEFFRIES »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/speaker-poll/?source=VPP_20230104_EMPOLL_E2_T0_AC&t=12&akid=5956%2E878179%2E_ldKMK)
---
[KEVIN MCCARTHY »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/speaker-poll/?source=VPP_20230104_EMPOLL_E2_T0_AC&t=13&akid=5956%2E878179%2E_ldKMK)
[SOMEONE ELSE »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/speaker-poll/?source=VPP_20230104_EMPOLL_E2_T0_AC&t=14&akid=5956%2E878179%2E_ldKMK)
[I DON'T KNOW »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/speaker-poll/?source=VPP_20230104_EMPOLL_E2_T0_AC&t=15&akid=5956%2E878179%2E_ldKMK)
Thank you for your response,

_– VPP_

name: Attorney Larry Klayman
subject: BREAKING: January 6 Peaceful Protesters BEG to get moved to Guantanamo Bay
body:
They’re BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment! No
They’re BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment! No Mass or Sunday worship service. Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine. Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells! | | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7ag9u9d97onim1njpe0lfrspqs7p68lqojgpt00_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c3hm1p36chh2bs)
---
| | |
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z5lgvmhpl26eh87ri49d3odi4kg94u0v6rh995gg_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c3hm1p36chh2bs) Hi Patriot,

[Please give a crucial $10, $25, $50, $100, or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two critical, class action lawsuits and hard-hitting legal actions to FREE ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS!](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zmbo3bv4jn975d9dj29muhqebf55cd1ajd4cv74o_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c3hm1p36chh2bs)

I just read the urgent letter signed by 34 innocent Americans, jailed in Washington, D.C for peacefully protesting the stolen 2020 presidential election.

**Patriot, what’s being done to them is so demonic, so foul, that they’re BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment!**

I’m heartsick and deeply angry about what’s being done to our fellow patriots.

Their letter reads like an appeal from dissidents in the Soviet Union.

Here are just a few examples of what they’re enduring (I quote directly from their letter, published by Gateway Pundit):

* Begging for Help / Water / Medical Aid / Mercy through a 4-inch by 10-inch window of cold metal doors
* No visits from family, friends, lawyers, or clergy
* No Mass or Sunday worship service
* Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine
* Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells
* Stuck in Cells for 9 days without a shower
* Solitary Confinement for 25 1⁄2 hours or more at a time

Outrageously, there’s more.

**Guards deny them hot water and keep them from attending court. They severely beat, mace, harass, insult, and even sexually assault them.**

Their food is so disgusting and so low in nutrition, that some prisoners are losing their eyesight, their hair, and getting scurvy (from Vitamin C deficiency).

There’s much, much more...all of it horrifying.

And this has been going on for up to a year and a half...in AMERICA.

**They conclude their letter by pleading to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba, where the Taliban, al-Qaeda, and ISIS terrorists get better treatment!**

This can’t go on. I won’t allow it.

I’m Larry Klayman, the founder ofstrong Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.

I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows. I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

Not to mention that I also enjoined Obama’s corrupt NSA from mass surveillance on hundreds of millions of Americans and killed Obama’s illegal amnesty for over 5 million illegal aliens, a case that went all the way to the Supreme Court!

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents – AND WIN!**

And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten regime in court.

**Nobody else is doing what I’m doing in court to get justice for these poor people.**

Patriot, please say a pray for the January 6 Prisoners. Their temptation to despair, to give up, must be enormous.

[Then I beg you to help me fight for them with your very best gift now of $10, $25, $50, $100, or even more. If you’ve given before, please give again. If you can, give more than you’ve ever given to Freedom Watch.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zlh70fjsdmuk0k224mnfhubmgm4oe87f23el2578_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c3hm1p36chh2bs)

I can’t do it without you, Patriot.

Thank you for doing whatever you can now.

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

P.S. Patriot, I’m heartbroken after reading that powerful letter from our fellow patriots who are rotting in jail in Washington, D.C. **These are innocent men and women, tortured and abused like they were political prisoners in a Third World dictatorship!**

[Please give what you can right now to help me fight to set them free. $5, $10, $25, $50, even more...whatever you can spare at this very moment. Each dollar counts.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zciikcfi2cvdnnm1bk5ko8bk80jirgt37ndmfg0o_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c3hm1p36chh2bs)

**Free the January 6 Protestors!
**
Right now, un-American politicians and corrupt members of the Department of Justice are keeping innocent Americans in jail without due process...they’re often abused and beaten...they’re blocked from seeing their wives and children...and kept from seeing their lawyers and clergy!

At least one January 6 protestor has already died.

And another protester, a patriot grandma with cancer, just finished serving 60 days in federal prison for a crime she didn’t commit.

[But there’s something you can do about it ...you can donate immediately to Freedom Watch’s critically important lawsuit to HELP FREE the rest of these persecuted patriots with your crucial gift today.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zbehamv4v685kb9p63f7heo6nlsmrg4opc0s5dt8_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c3hm1p36chh2bs)
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zt5bag2lkpfphptnp5eqqu6cor9vhh5tasoabp0o_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or7c9ge6o74cpi649fg)

body:
| Fellow American,

It’s Senator Tim Scott, and I need you to take action today to help me and my fellow Senate Republicans win back the Senate.

I wish Republicans had won back the Senate majority and I weren’t having to write this email to you. Today I’m **[asking for your assistance.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=3d93504d5c274478a61587c1c092942a&_e=WexQ5Y9Nxv7QZ0QoVf7ndfLuk7tSZWA1cKkbc4ydtTjp03gXIT5xvNq_dlhtCxNHVQFoWSWN82t329CCLSVZbESzt6DzWwTyxhDGqH5wjnmC9RMPLyEPRFjIqqha_SzY9td5cOKWTCG5sWNia5vHOejtfmlSDKZcD2KBLFKN09ErtQJblk7DZjH5q7A1ia0BxjkSNHSu8OlBDUzAQrNqQfsKfVsMUF0YgTyuKoqMP24DCherORmKQ-lkTpOuHqpCfmwJyvmnLCXhUtzRDvfDggxdpSxSjJgumYxu0_uNEVtikvl9ZEtJG3bV1jlkdD2QE3TD_bFsUeHQln31BSQsqCNJAZ-EDVafP3qN1eMRAjTH2vzNuwoXMcdmcDcIls3YVQaeW9adFu0LFbO8BKDFnngkfvAH_YASoIleCZNj464%3D)** Frankly, I am not sure a lot of folks realize what is at stake with Democrats in full control of Washington.

I’ll break it down for you:

1\. **TRILLIONS in additional federal spending.** Dems don’t care how to pay for it.
2\. **Federalization of elections.** They don’t really care who gets to vote as long as new voters vote Democrat, all the while claiming Republicans are guilty of systemic racism.
3\. **NEW deep blue states.** This could cement a Democrat majority for generations to come.
4\. **Nuking of the Filibuster.** While this is a harder get for Dems, they’re putting maximum pressure on centrist democrats to cave and support stripping the minority party any protection still available.

**[It’s paramount you’re on our team.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=3d93504d5c274478a61587c1c092942a&_e=WexQ5Y9Nxv7QZ0QoVf7ndfLuk7tSZWA1cKkbc4ydtTjp03gXIT5xvNq_dlhtCxNHVQFoWSWN82t329CCLSVZbESzt6DzWwTyxhDGqH5wjnmC9RMPLyEPRFjIqqha_SzY9td5cOKWTCG5sWNia5vHOejtfmlSDKZcD2KBLFKN09ErtQJblk7DZjH5q7A1ia0BxjkSNHSu8OlBDUzAQrNqQfsKfVsMUF0YgTyuKoqMP24DCherORmKQ-lkTpOuHqpCfmwJyvmnLCXhUtzRDvfDguzrh3NYqHAiDnHotp08rz11cLkBSfRpNVBRwgxcp8wDWKKqJb1ecZV0tul4Qsmo-XjKHucHpEfWakXq0IpsgvdK3yFY-ghDZQqYI84jtIAwMbM8gFEge9UAhzfk4ufbasnnlz90bD4uQDtC4bys3HE%3D)** Republicans only need a net gain of **_TWO_ seat to win back the Senate**, so with that in mind I’m asking for you to put a little skin in the game if you believe in the Republican vision for the country: Donate just $5 or more to our efforts.

**Request for dpwillis67@gmail.com
[Gift $5 or more to help win back the Senate](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=3d93504d5c274478a61587c1c092942a&_e=WexQ5Y9Nxv7QZ0QoVf7ndfLuk7tSZWA1cKkbc4ydtTjp03gXIT5xvNq_dlhtCxNHVQFoWSWN82t329CCLSVZbESzt6DzWwTyxhDGqH5wjnmC9RMPLyEPRFjIqqha_SzY9td5cOKWTCG5sWNia5vHOejtfmlSDKZcD2KBLFKN09ErtQJblk7DZjH5q7A1ia0BxjkSNHSu8OlBDUzAQrNqQfsKfVsMUF0YgTyuKoqMP24DCherORmKQ-lkTpOuHqpCfmwJyvmnLCXhUtzRDvfDgoUbHJmO3-mb52AP55p13c0y1JHgyWeFF-s2WP-o61XAI1U8M27QF6D9KOZrOD6bGdHi0-nmK0D8ZJmzAjcIW6TL3nUL4NpsruEvqeP9-ZiITHtsvErf1g2GizsV6WSAUU8n5wtTHHg0cyRV2iLr7Dg%3D)
Status: PENDING **
Joe Biden may talk a good game and tweet nice things, but the fact of the matter is this - we’ve spent more money in the past two years than at any time since World War 2. **This rate of spending isn’t sustainable.**

And despite the thinnest Senate majority in years, Democrats think they have a mandate to implement the most radical makeover of society America has ever seen.

I’m committed to stopping them in their tracks, because I know Republicans can – and will – do better, **[but I need your help right now.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=3d93504d5c274478a61587c1c092942a&_e=WexQ5Y9Nxv7QZ0QoVf7ndfLuk7tSZWA1cKkbc4ydtTjp03gXIT5xvNq_dlhtCxNHVQFoWSWN82t329CCLSVZbESzt6DzWwTyxhDGqH5wjnmC9RMPLyEPRFjIqqha_SzY9td5cOKWTCG5sWNia5vHOejtfmlSDKZcD2KBLFKN09ErtQJblk7DZjH5q7A1ia0BxjkSNHSu8OlBDUzAQrNqQfsKfVsMUF0YgTyuKoqMP24DCherORmKQ-lkTpOuHqpCfmwJyvmnLCXhUtzRDvfDgpdGAQYjvOnKax-ZL666UtIt4EMpplxaN1u4PRpvBw1K5aIq-IMWnPkI5-qn1blT2SKCJlPCWfK0YBoEPtAv3Frd53IbsrWZsZVi7XrXhFXp7jny7vbAkLJR3C4p6kd9Qfx7-ICKTzwWcvTHQIbNxG0%3D)**

Senator Tim Scott

name: [List Domain] on behalf of Hillsdale College
subject: Your thoughts on the Second Amendment
body:
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62159745:6SZbAvGuN:m:1:3334294963:0A64E0A2C50C01AAD48DC3F4864170D7:r) Dear Friend of the Constitution, The far Left in America is attempting to rewrite our nation's history and undermine our Constitution, with a special emphasis on eliminating the Second Amendment. Today, you're receiving Hillsdale College's **Second Amendment Survey** because you're someone who understands that education is essential to the defense of liberty. We are reaching and teaching millions of Americans about the importance of liberty, and we are doing this without accepting even ONE PENNY of government funding. Could you take a few minutes to complete our **Second Amendment Survey** using the secure link below? [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62159745:6SZbAvGuN:m:1:3334294963:0A64E0A2C50C01AAD48DC3F4864170D7:r "https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/") Your timely survey answers will help us reach and teach millions of our fellow citizens in the coming year about the importance of liberty, which includes the rights protected by the Second Amendment. There is no question that one of the Left's most powerful tools in its ongoing effort to undermine our liberty is **ignorance**. Here at Hillsdale, we have been pursuing truth and defending liberty since the College was founded in 1844. Today our educational outreach efforts include programs on a variety of topics essential to liberty, such as the Second Amendment. As constitutional scholar Edward J. Erler observed in _Imprimis_ , our digest of liberty that reaches millions of Americans: "The Second Amendment is an expression of **first principles**." This means the Second Amendment is essential for the preservation of freedom. If we are denied the means of defending our freedom, we will eventually lose our freedom. This kind of thinking is foreign to most college and university campuses today, where "safe spaces" are now commonplace, and shooting clubs are nearly extinct. Here's an example... Not long ago, the University of Virginia canceled its traditional 21-gun salute on Veterans Day. Why? The administration was concerned that firing guns in honor of those who served their country and did their part to defend our freedom would cause "panic" among the student body. Unfortunately, there are many more such examples I could cite to illustrate the disastrous effects of the ongoing decline in civics education in America. **But instead of just TALKING, it's more important to DO something about it.** That's why we have been working to expand our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. And this work continues today. That's why I would like your answers to our brief **Second Amendment Survey.** You can complete the survey today at this secure link: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62159745:6SZbAvGuN:m:1:3334294963:0A64E0A2C50C01AAD48DC3F4864170D7:r) We believe that an educated citizenry is essential for the preservation of our liberty. As Ronald Reagan said, "Freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction." Do you agree? I hope so. This is why we **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans about the principles of liberty and the Constitution. It's also why we need your help today. As I mentioned, Hillsdale refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. This frees us from much burdensome and corrupting federal regulation. Our independence from the government means that our work is entirely dependent on the generous support of citizens like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. It also means your gift really matters. **Today, you have a great opportunity to help preserve liberty, including the Second Amendment, for future generations.** After completing your **Second Amendment Survey** , please join me in the cause of liberty with your generous tax-deductible gift today. And, when you give a $100 gift or more, we'll send you a special, limited-edition Hillsdale College hat as our thank you. This hat commemorates our partnership with USA Shooting, the organization dedicated to preparing the best American shooters to represent our country in the Olympics and Paralympics. But hurry, supplies are limited! Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed **Second Amendment Survey.** Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
**P.S.** Our Constitution, including the Second Amendment, is under attack today. Do you agree? Then please take our **Second Amendment Survey** at the secure link below. It will only take a few minutes, and your answers will help to preserve liberty for future generations. Thank you! [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62159745:6SZbAvGuN:m:1:3334294963:0A64E0A2C50C01AAD48DC3F4864170D7:r)
---
This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
You were added to the system August 9, 2022.
For more information [click here](http://email.vervemail.com/p/i6SZbAvGuN). [Update your preferences](http://email.vervemail.com/p/o6SZbAvGuN)

name: KatiePorter.com
subject: A new bill in effect
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Congress
body:
Pharma companies will be punished if they raise prices faster than the rate of inflation.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/12?t=1&akid=15610%2E3422442%2E0aE3GN)
The start of the new year doesn't just mean new resolutions—many new laws that were passed in 2022 officially took effect on the first of the year.
**Katie’s bill that punishes pharmaceutical companies if they raise prices faster than the rate of inflation is officially in action!** It was signed into law this summer as part of the Inflation Reduction Act.
**This is good news for patients.** Roughly one in three Americans don’t take medications as prescribed because they can’t afford to. Big Pharma’s greed harms people’s health.
**It’s also good news for every single taxpayer.** When Medicare has to pay Big Pharma higher prices, it’s taxpayers who absorb the cost and get ripped off.
There’s more work to be done, and Katie will keep fighting to hold Big Pharma accountable and reduce the cost of healthcare.
Onward,
Team Porter
**[Donate ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14212?refcode=EMAF04_PHA_20230104_V1_F&t=2&akid=15610%2E3422442%2E0aE3GN)**

Paid for by Katie Porter for Congress
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you would like to update your information, please **[click here.](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/em-update-info-footer/?t=3&akid=15610%2E3422442%2E0aE3GN)** Our campaign is powered by grassroots supporters chipping in to emails just like this one. If you would like to receive fewer emails, please [**click here**](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp-unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=15610%2E3422442%2E0aE3GN).

To contribute via check, please address to: Katie Porter for Congress, PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616

body:
It’s time to get back to work, friends’. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56894284/386293187/-144884643?refcode=AU_MFB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230104_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1N2UyNjA3Yy03YzhjLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8Tzw2mi_kh7mpDLkKxtWVWSdB-qeubGvZN2pdVEeuvs=) Folks, Yesterday, I was sworn into the United States Senate to serve Colorado for six more years. Now, it’s time to get back to work. Coloradans sent me back to Washington because they see the same problems I do: a changing climate, a fragile democracy, a healthcare system that costs too much and covers too few, and an economy that helps those on top get further ahead but leaves everyone else behind. **Folks, let’s make this next term our best yet.** Let’s lift millions more children out of poverty by making the extended _Child Tax Credit_ permanent. Let’s create thousands of more jobs and continue tackling the climate crisis by investing more in green energy and environmental protection. Let’s get back to work ending forty years of failed “trickle-down” policies and build an economy that works for all of us. And let’s reject Donald Trump and his allies’ attempts to destroy our democracy. That is what we worked for in this election, and we won. But yesterday’s swearing-in does not signal the end of our work — only a new beginning. **So, if you’re still with me:**[**Make a donation today to become a 2023 Founding Donor and support our continued work. clean_body: It’s time to get back to work, friends’. | = Folks, Yesterday, I was sworn into the United States Senate to serve Colorado for six more years. Now, it’s time to get back to work. Coloradans sent me back to Washington because they see the same problems I do: a changing climate, a fragile democracy, a healthcare system that costs too much and covers too few, and an economy that helps those on top get further ahead but leaves everyone else behind. Folks, let’s make this next term our best yet. Let’s lift millions more children out of poverty by making the extended Child Tax Credit permanent. Let’s create thousands of more jobs and continue tackling the climate crisis by investing more in green energy and environmental protection. Let’s get back to work ending forty years of failed “trickle-down” policies and build an economy that works for all of us. And let’s reject Donald Trump and his allies’ attempts to destroy our democracy. That is what we worked for in this election, and we won. But yesterday’s swearing-in does not signal the end of our work — only a new beginning. So, if you’re still with me:= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: ** | | | ****=**** | ******=**** | | ****=**** | ******=**** | | ****=**** | ******=**** Your donation will help support everything my team and I do in the months and years ahead: from organizing to pass policies like the Child Tax Credit , to electing more Democrats in Washington and across Colorado. I cannot do this work without you. name: =?utf-8?Q?Andrew?=
subject: SFCN Announces Darin Gaub, Maria Nate, and Jessie Rubino As State Directors For Montana, Idaho, and Wyoming (Respectively)
body:
| | | |
---
| | |
#
**FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE
CONTACT: Robert Donachie
robert@athospr.com

WASHINGTON, D.C.** – The State Freedom Caucus Network (SFCN) is excited to announce the hiring of Darin Gaub, Maria Nate, and Jessie Rubino to serve as the state directors for Montana, Idaho, and Wyoming (respectively) as official freedom caucuses are launched in their states today.

Darin Gaub is a resident of Helena and served an extensive career in the U.S. Army. As an aviation officer flying Blackhawk helicopters, his deployments took him around the globe and included four tours in Afghanistan. He is a co-founder of Restore Liberty, an organization focused on reviving and restoring the knowledge of and passion for the liberty America was founded upon. He and his wife have two adult children.

Maria Nate is a resident of Rexburg and brings decades of political experience to the table. She serves as the Secretary of the Idaho GOP, has managed all five of her husband's state legislative campaigns, and was selected as a delegate to the 2020 Republican National Convention. Maria has also served on her local school board and is a member of the Madison County Republican Women’s club. She and her husband have four adult children.

Jessie Rubino is an attorney who has worked in the state legislature and most recently was an American History teacher in Casper. While in law school, she served as a Legal Fellow at the Mountain States Legal Foundation, a public interest law firm based in Colorado defending civil liberties and private property rights. A native of Wyoming, Jessie has also worked on several statewide political campaigns.

**SFCN President Andy Roth issued the following statement: **

“This is a very exciting time for the State Freedom Caucus Network as we add three new state directors to our team. At a time when west coast voters and their progressive politics are migrating into these traditionally conservative states, it is more important than ever to step up and fight back.

Darin, Maria, and Jessie all bring unique experiences and local knowledge to the table. We are proud to have them on our team and look forward to assisting them and their legislators to ensure that the values and freedoms so cherished in the Mountain West stay at the forefront of lawmakers minds in Helena, Boise, and Cheyenne.”

**Read more about the State Freedom Caucus Network at StateFreedomCaucus.org.**
**###**

clean_body: | | | | | | | FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE CONTACT: Robert Donachie robert@athospr.com WASHINGTON, D.C. – The State Freedom Caucus Network (SFCN) is excited to announce the hiring of Darin Gaub, Maria Nate, and Jessie Rubino to serve as the state directors for Montana, Idaho, and Wyoming (respectively) as official freedom caucuses are launched in their states today. Darin Gaub is a resident of Helena and served an extensive career in the U.S. Army. As an aviation officer flying Blackhawk helicopters, his deployments took him around the globe and included four tours in Afghanistan. He is a co-founder of Restore Liberty, an organization focused on reviving and restoring the knowledge of and passion for the liberty America was founded upon. He and his wife have two adult children. Maria Nate is a resident of Rexburg and brings decades of political experience to the table. She serves as the Secretary of the Idaho GOP, has managed all five of her husband's state legislative campaigns, and was selected as a delegate to the 2020 Republican National Convention. Maria has also served on her local school board and is a member of the Madison County Republican Women’s club. She and her husband have four adult children. Jessie Rubino is an attorney who has worked in the state legislature and most recently was an American History teacher in Casper. While in law school, she served as a Legal Fellow at the Mountain States Legal Foundation, a public interest law firm based in Colorado defending civil liberties and private property rights. A native of Wyoming, Jessie has also worked on several statewide political campaigns. SFCN President Andy Roth issued the following statement: “This is a very exciting time for the State Freedom Caucus Network as we add three new state directors to our team. At a time when west coast voters and their progressive politics are migrating into these traditionally conservative states, it is more important than ever to step up and fight back. Darin, Maria, and Jessie all bring unique experiences and local knowledge to the table. We are proud to have them on our team and look forward to assisting them and their legislators to ensure that the values and freedoms so cherished in the Mountain West stay at the forefront of lawmakers minds in Helena, Boise, and Cheyenne.” Read more about the State Freedom Caucus Network at StateFreedomCaucus.org. | | | | Copyright © 2023 State Freedom Caucus Network, All rights reserved.

| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fa4bdc3bc8c2422f8701c4b9697430f9&_e=Pz-pkFmwtlFt3JFcdwNnr_lUeUQXXyhqGVJJtEaRIquV9_de-dQAIt5IXawxOzzux3-cCXKJsU2RRlh01yS5MuqTvdDaieyQlTzkq88cTeiWQOMPMC94xi7gQast3qRVTCndZGsBhPgNmSTTGicu1p4ZKLtCDUqmU0xsf2bcaXhCFOsJm0jK9aNPlh4hOILEJgYGvIsaxlm3g_1yNuo4NZwWKXWuzsblO5tmywfD3s4TolNJ5D75g5V94PpLnYeWBETGg77u8iMeR1pVx4wVFQ3LVbihVBrDMBoYyUyKqvT_oCpq0__4Fd0GxO1eeHzNRHLi73R_Qldwu3axnmo7dX-X371ZZ52ns0ofCaNnw1RJpEiuA0UA8ZkejS7WQM7GsZ4UI9JRkayVZFb0nkidVEsy6uyF-DA2M9BovnDxwiLoocV7x6lVgrAwA5tStmNb)" which you can now own on DVD.

| [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fa4bdc3bc8c2422f8701c4b9697430f9&_e=Pz-pkFmwtlFt3JFcdwNnr_lUeUQXXyhqGVJJtEaRIquV9_de-dQAIt5IXawxOzzux3-cCXKJsU2RRlh01yS5MuqTvdDaieyQlTzkq88cTeiWQOMPMC94xi7gQast3qRVTCndZGsBhPgNmSTTGicu1p4ZKLtCDUqmU0xsf2bcaXhCFOsJm0jK9aNPlh4hOILEJgYGvIsaxlm3g_1yNuo4NZwWKXWuzsblO5tmywfD3s4TolNJ5D75g5V94PpLnYeWBETGg77u8iMeR1pVx4wVFfBKbdP7Oz3Ji4ZaqYNtLBsM0qcYsa7sbzcn7ejB-KLH01Ok3VQZv3MbVjtVWsOZN-Q1HX_IUBZUIjn22T5_1_a4ZY3xA5saGGXtKipuGVidKWNO7phrUpx4hY0rvIKN84Kc-T36taR3y1P23_r8pOfHPmmI3fwLDcKWe0nsbDU3)

| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fa4bdc3bc8c2422f8701c4b9697430f9&_e=Pz-pkFmwtlFt3JFcdwNnr_lUeUQXXyhqGVJJtEaRIquV9_de-dQAIt5IXawxOzzux3-cCXKJsU2RRlh01yS5MuqTvdDaieyQlTzkq88cTeiWQOMPMC94xi7gQast3qRVTCndZGsBhPgNmSTTGicu1p4ZKLtCDUqmU0xsf2bcaXhCFOsJm0jK9aNPlh4hOILEJgYGvIsaxlm3g_1yNuo4NZwWKXWuzsblO5tmywfD3s4TolNJ5D75g5V94PpLnYeWBETGg77u8iMeR1pVx4wVFZeLC5BtRvG0htIiGjJLPtDmB1Qt9x9xXSxQ9GMgHegBJ9Ik-8RgNywChUYSOUaSzHIOSfcxd-hjrAR2bNfbSgiYwVPzkYPnor0EzAW3ssETespk5ZYYT1NTKe55e1OUR0D4BRHxGiX5AaxO0nh0fvgTxV5S_TsgJBsW--hTr_L0).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
