clean_body: | | Peter, You probably saw that Kevin McCarthy has now lost multiple votes to be the next Speaker of the House. Republicans just can’t get their s#t together. So what do Kevin McCarthy and Kyrsten Sinema have in common? They’re both universally despised by their colleagues. They’re completely delusional about their political trajectories. Their political fortunes are sinking by the day. Oh, and, they’re friends. Really. Remember this? That’s right, Sinema is buddies with McCarthy and one of his chief right-wing opponents, Andy Biggs. It makes us wonder – if Sinema were still in the House, would she have already defected from the Democrats to help out McCarthy, or would she be sympathetic to the MAGA lunatics trying to install someone even worse? Of course, it’s not just that Sinema has spent so much time praising Republicans like McCarthy, Biggs, and Mitch McConnell. It’s that she’s done it while also disparaging President Biden and Democrats. She even accused several of her Democratic colleagues of “hiding behind my skirt.” Disgusting. Help us make sure this is Sinema’s last term in office, and that it’s a Democrat – not a Republican – who replaces her. Thanks for all you’re doing, -the team at Replace Sinema & Change for Arizona 2024 Paid for by Change for Arizona 2024 PAC. | | Sent via . name: Judicial Watch Corruption Chronicles
subject: Judicial Watch and New York City Settle Federal Lawsuit on Voter Registration Clean-Up after City Removes 441,083 Ineligible Names from Voter Rolls
body:
Judicial Watch announced recently that it is settling a federal
election integrity lawsuit against New York City after the city
removed 441,083 ineligible names from the voter rolls and promised to
take reasonable steps going forward to clean its voter registration
lists

[alt_text]

[*****]
January 04, 2023

[article-image]
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61650&L=28646&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvanctYW5kLW55Yy1zZXR0bGUtbGF3c3VpdC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1jb3JydXB0aW9uK2Nocm9uaWNsZXMmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1DTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0Q=]

The Judicial Watch lawsuit detailed that New York City’s “own
recent data concedes that there were only 22 total” removals under
this provision “during a six-year period, in a city of over 5.5
million voters. These are ludicrously small numbers of removals given
the sizable populations of these counties.” Moreover, the “almost
complete failure of Kings, Queens, New York, Bronx, and Richmond
Counties, over a period of at least six years, to remove voters”
under a key provision of federal law “means that there are untold
numbers of New York City registrations for voters who are ineligible
to vote at their listed address because they have changed residence or
are otherwise ineligible to vote.”

body:
Yesterday, the 118th Congress officially convened to vote for the next Speaker of the House. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56894143/386292522/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZDQ0NjAyNi03YjhjLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LpsRXUx7voJbknLkVRSe_Bq2dvjU08AXNmCaueursg0=&emci=70e13d83-5a8c-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=8d446026-7b8c-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=15820338)
---
Peter,

Yesterday, the 118th Congress officially convened to vote for the next Speaker of the House. While Kim and her Democratic colleagues united firmly around Representative Hakeem Jeffries, it was utter chaos on the Republican side.

For the first time in 100 years, a Speaker election required more than one floor vote after Kevin McCarthy failed to secure the votes needed – not once, not twice, but SIX times.

As of this moment, no Speaker of the House has been selected which means no member can be sworn in and no votes on legislation can begin until the process is completed.

**The Republicans’ inability to unite around a Speaker is a preview of what we can expect over the next two years – infighting and politics being put before what's best for the American people.**

Kim is ready to get back to work to fight for the issues that matter most to Washingtonians, but yesterday's votes prove more than ever how important it is that Democrats retake the House majority in 2024.

clean_body: Yesterday, the 118th Congress officially convened to vote for the next Speaker of the House. Peter, Yesterday, the 118th Congress officially convened to vote for the next Speaker of the House. While Kim and her Democratic colleagues united firmly around Representative Hakeem Jeffries, it was utter chaos on the Republican side. For the first time in 100 years, a Speaker election required more than one floor vote after Kevin McCarthy failed to secure the votes needed – not once, not twice, but SIX times. As of this moment, no Speaker of the House has been selected which means no member can be sworn in and no votes on legislation can begin until the process is completed. The Republicans’ inability to unite around a Speaker is a preview of what we can expect over the next two years – infighting and politics being put before what's best for the American people. Kim is ready to get back to work to fight for the issues that matter most to Washingtonians, but yesterday's votes prove more than ever how important it is that Democrats retake the House majority in 2024. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = = Thanks, Team Schrier = Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress Contributions or gifts to Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress are not tax deductible. The 2A Task Force focuses on defending one of our most essential constitutional rights, the right to keep and bear arms, and highlights the importance of not complying. Despite the Biden administration and the radical left’s mission to rewrite our Constitution, our mission is to reinforce and protect us from tyrants using the power of government to take away our liberties. clean_body: | | | It’s Ben Wikler, Chair of the Democratic Party of Wisconsin. Here’s the good news: Because of supporters like you, Georgia sent Rev. Raphael Warnock back to the Senate, and in Wisconsin, we stopped a GOP supermajority in the state Assembly. We held our ground, and democracy prevailed in Wisconsin in 2022! But here's the bad news: Wisconsin Republicans are just a few seats away from a takeover of the legislature because of their gerrymandered maps. If we lose the upcoming Wisconsin Supreme Court election, Republicans will gerrymander their way to NEVER losing another election. I refuse to let that happen! = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be split between the Democratic Pary of Wisconsin and the Democratic Party of Georgia and will process as a monthly recurring donation immediately: = = = = = = Thank you, Ben Wikler | | Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia. body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=1545%2E5257348%2E_8py-W ]Adam Schiff for Congress

Derek, we’re in uncharted territory. It’s been more than 24
hours since the new Congress began and not a single House member has been
sworn in.

And here’s why:

Kevin McCarthy has no strongly held values or beliefs. He stands for
nothing but himself. Without any core convictions, without the respect of
his own Conference, he has tried and failed over and over again to be
elected Speaker.

Our Democratic Caucus — more diverse, more representative, more unified —
has stood strong, with every member holding the line while the Republican
melodrama and infighting play out on national television.

And because McCarthy is so shameless, lacking the capacity to feel
humiliated by his repeated failures, we are stuck in this process until
Republicans make a deal amongst themselves.

This is supposed to be the easy part. A formality. If Republicans cannot
elect a Speaker, they will not be able to even attempt to govern.

The embarrassment, debasement, and degree to which the Republican Party is
showing the American people how dysfunctional they are says it all. They
are not fit to lead.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=jan2023_abs_em.lYGpWb&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20230104_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=1004&akid=1545%2E5257348%2E_8py-W ]If you agree that this national disgrace proves Republicans don’t
deserve the House Majority, make a contribution today to help Democrats
take it back in two years. Let’s not waste another moment.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

name: Brandon Tatum
subject: Most hateful organization in America
body:
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c7c877b0d47045daad2de9e28a105983&_e=W1KHnX2xxBaRDsL4zipMqZADv4H7GRXiX6Zk2fs2wg3soV4MkPZJ0duIuev6RmspsGfV3Sp9IYsQVk6PfGGAEth0FxNbb3lFgzDIhnKDL3jFxzyNdrmpcT5y4K1GN0rDFX40UMIVxFAg61EtuWkHaf7POGKuErhQ17fuOrY7nt2HLRpD3iY79rXssHbOLG_z7lrFE0P9N6FnLJHnDxtqyRzEc2L5PsdS1shiVDMaUSDfDr2MhnTWl4-olzPFI8wKPP9gYxoghBF7n1eJKftgQRsJ5-ZUsePtj57mmB_jzcc%3D)

Friend,

**I am a Black man, and I 'm telling you exactly which organization is the most hateful, divisive group in the United States of America - _Black Lives Matter_.**

Now, I know what you're thinking... _What about the KKK, or what about neo-nazis?_

I ask, "what about them is influential?!"

This is 2022. Does the KKK have institutional power like BLM does? Is the KKK receiving millions of dollars from corporations and Hollywood celebrities?

No. They aren't, but BLM is.

BLM claims to speak for Black communities. But all I ever hear from BLM is how much they hate America. They only focus on victimhood to divide us as the greatest nation on Earth. BLM cries out for action, but the only action they do is burn down Black neighborhoods and cozy up to corporations.

I saw the hypocrisy long ago. **That 's why I started the BLEXIT Foundation with Candace Owens. **

**BLEXIT** is a non-profit bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

_Our message to America 's black and minority communities is that you are NOT a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture_.

I believe God has put me on this mission to reach Black communities. I'll tell you the full story of how I cofounded BLEXIT with Candace, but first, I must ask for your immediate support.

[_**Can you please support BLEXIT by sending a gift of $5, $10, $20.22, $100, or any amount you can afford today? Click here to donate >>**_](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c7c877b0d47045daad2de9e28a105983&_e=W1KHnX2xxBaRDsL4zipMqZADv4H7GRXiX6Zk2fs2wg3soV4MkPZJ0duIuev6RmspsGfV3Sp9IYsQVk6PfGGAEth0FxNbb3lFgzDIhnKDL3jFxzyNdrmpcT5y4K1GN0rDFX40UMIVxFAg61EtuWkHaZpGLZt8suAFZdGP5AJ90pwT0dUzkOovI4V7QIFv_pD935S_V8ARIXxOqMYS5C6pb30bhjn5gU7YFjLAxAGw2RRUeZ6ZgqpGNY_qzmdy16bX5Gt11CSH07IOAH6T9KGKQYa7DriPaFcFlJWr8oq5DkA%3D)

**How I Started BLEXIT**

I was an All-American high school football player in Fort Worth, Texas. I accepted a full athletic scholarship from the University of Arizona in 2005. I played at Arizona for five years and entered the NFL Draft in 2010; however, God had other plans.

With my entire family around, I was not drafted. I was so angry. I ripped my shirt off. But, God had other plans for me.

This led me to join the Tucson police force, and it changed my life forever.

I learned what it meant to put my life on the line to save others. I woke up every morning to thank Jesus that I got to live another day to serve. This experience taught me a lot, but it was foundational to learning about the lies of BLM.

Learning that BLM is lying to Black communities and teaching them to hate the police forever changed my opinion on the "Black Lives Matter" organization. But more importantly, I learned not to be a victim. Not getting drafted into the NFL taught me life lessons I wouldn't have learned otherwise. I learned to serve others.

Now, I'm giving back to the Black community to make sure they don't become bought into this toxic victimhood mentality that BLM pushes.

Click here to donate any amount >>**_](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c7c877b0d47045daad2de9e28a105983&_e=W1KHnX2xxBaRDsL4zipMqZADv4H7GRXiX6Zk2fs2wg3soV4MkPZJ0duIuev6RmspsGfV3Sp9IYsQVk6PfGGAEth0FxNbb3lFgzDIhnKDL3jFxzyNdrmpcT5y4K1GN0rDFX40UMIVxFAg61EtuWkHaeALsGNi2tuy8cKL3qwjiyMbItvCYJV6J2XEQalfr2SvDkJ06su51Qu-HV4z3MuTgb85odAvQPMYjgVXF8yTjzVm4HWSUQ2Ju4fpvgzudbGWm66PHYn4cLoemlnkWICxYlPquhWQnu8GeMtsumdH9cA%3D)

clean_body: Friend, I am a Black man, and I 'm telling you exactly which organization is the most hateful, divisive group in the United States of America - Black Lives Matter. Now, I know what you're thinking... What about the KKK, or what about neo-nazis? I ask, "what about them is influential?!" This is 2022. Does the KKK have institutional power like BLM does? Is the KKK receiving millions of dollars from corporations and Hollywood celebrities? No. They aren't, but BLM is. BLM claims to speak for Black communities. But all I ever hear from BLM is how much they hate America. They only focus on victimhood to divide us as the greatest nation on Earth. BLM cries out for action, but the only action they do is burn down Black neighborhoods and cozy up to corporations. I saw the hypocrisy long ago. That 's why I started the BLEXIT Foundation with Candace Owens. BLEXIT is a non-profit bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities. Our message to America 's black and minority communities is that you are NOT a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture. I believe God has put me on this mission to reach Black communities. I'll tell you the full story of how I cofounded BLEXIT with Candace, but first, I must ask for your immediate support. How I Started BLEXIT I was an All-American high school football player in Fort Worth, Texas. I accepted a full athletic scholarship from the University of Arizona in 2005. I played at Arizona for five years and entered the NFL Draft in 2010; however, God had other plans. With my entire family around, I was not drafted. I was so angry. I ripped my shirt off. But, God had other plans for me. This led me to join the Tucson police force, and it changed my life forever. I learned what it meant to put my life on the line to save others. I woke up every morning to thank Jesus that I got to live another day to serve. This experience taught me a lot, but it was foundational to learning about the lies of BLM. Learning that BLM is lying to Black communities and teaching them to hate the police forever changed my opinion on the "Black Lives Matter" organization. But more importantly, I learned not to be a victim. Not getting drafted into the NFL taught me life lessons I wouldn't have learned otherwise. I learned to serve others. Now, I'm giving back to the Black community to make sure they don't become bought into this toxic victimhood mentality that BLM pushes. BLM incites lawlessness. BLEXIT stands for the rule of law. BLM destroys communities. BLEXIT empowers them. BLM only sees the color of your skin. BLEXIT sees character. BLM wants to disrupt families. BLEXT values the nuclear family. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with 42 grassroots chapter programs in 42 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters. Here 's how you can help: I am looking to raise $83,000 online to support BLEXIT during this critical year. We must expand our chapters, build new leaders, and reach people within Black communities. This is a long game we are playing. If this were a football game, we would only be in the 1st quarter. BLM thinks they speak for Black communities, but we are taking over quickly and providing real opportunities for our members. Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today: HOW BLEXIT Works Step One: We enter communities no one else dares to go into - Detroit, Baltimore, New Orleans, Houston, etc. We host events and set up chapters of volunteers who build a support network and help get our message of individualism and empowerment to Black neighborhoods. Step Two: We send the best volunteers and chapter members to our Leadership Academy. We build leaders from the ground up. In fact, our staff is full of stories of activists we hired from the Leadership Academy. They started as a chapter member and now work for us full time. Other members graduate from the Leadership Academy, and then they go back into their communities to support others or start their own businesses. As you can see, we are BUILDING neighborhoods, NOT destroying them. Step Three: Our educational content, both online and in-person, is teaching Black communities ideas they will never hear in the mainstream media. BLEXIT is teaching about individualism, pro-life, school choice, teaching REAL history (not Critical Race Theory), and creating patriotism among Black families. Step Four: We host large events with hundreds, sometimes thousands of attendees. Our events bring music, live entertainment, and education to Black communities. What I really want to emphasize is this - BLEXIT is a "DO" tank! We are out there meeting people in neighborhoods. Friend, this is deeply personal for me as a Black man. We have to save our communities. We must save our country from the toxic and divisive organizations like BLM that are tearing down our businesses and livelihoods. So, please, I implore you to send any amount you generously can. We are a 501(c)(3) organization, and your support is tax-deductible. People ask me, "What does BLEXIT mean?" It is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. " If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim, you become your own oppressor." \- Candace Owens We believe in Faith, Freedom, and Family. With those three principles intact, you can find prosperity no matter how your life may have started. And I believe that is what will save us all in the end. Thank you, Brandon Tatum Co-Founder BLEXIT Foundation Sent to Conservatives Give subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: John Kasich
subject: What a mess
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich for America, not authorized by any
body:
If you’ve tuned into the news the last 24 hours, you’ve likely seen the dysfunction happening in the U.S. House with the failure to elect someone to serve as the next Speaker.| | | [](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=2348789eb10d429eafb676ba49c94aac&_e=LKgSlECJgGs_otI5BWBC6vHiWzOEX2YS4lVGoYWQM6IPi3pCgarujz5zfAYUiYV3beqlg6Yog2SHN1SbuoH1lmZ-7cq_q5dCbSMHs4jv0p5-oN3HDf397FZzofQNf-zzXsFsDmqofWkC38OxV-TcDGOHzLJxxR7v4IOjWkstUwTm1dY8TZylZzLBhJIJV45QcIeOWKgDHy0bGU0KhGJVrg%3D%3D)
---
Peter, If you’ve tuned into the news the last 24 hours, you’ve likely seen the dysfunction happening in the U.S. House with the failure to elect someone to serve as the next Speaker. At the time of this email, Congressman Kevin McCarthy has appeared on the ballot six times and failed to reach the winning threshold each time. It seems clear at this point that he doesn’t have the votes to win and the Republican Party needs to chart a new path forward to show the American people that it can govern. I posted a [comment on Twitter](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=2348789eb10d429eafb676ba49c94aac&_e=LKgSlECJgGs_otI5BWBC6qbLn6LPpRA51taK7aU1NcNESPTNEFqc9HkPHS-aDUI5CqOrH1SmXwSeQW68OeW3UhAvLsYBAiwCSnJg_Q1_30CJ2IfiezH0JPvMn-vtsDxfkF_iw1nEdDU1y_ppp2O-SORQFkKnbRA3SZl0BtpAyCCEuGiXKQPtGpiyzfTJJnd0QjV58i8y_RwariOECe_IYutA2Asf11_Oo4PLDY7VDgL6ReEQ1srl0Ef9K7wsRiBSfSBsM5Q7kHY5UJZo8q8kOxBXhRA4-N7R_yq1K-KC9ng%3D) yesterday suggesting a new way forward and it already has more than 5 million impressions, meaning that it is driving a lot of online discussion about this topic. I also recently talked about this in a TV interview [that you can watch (here)](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=2348789eb10d429eafb676ba49c94aac&_e=LKgSlECJgGs_otI5BWBC6qbLn6LPpRA51taK7aU1NcNESPTNEFqc9HkPHS-aDUI5wNu5AlhAPGHaSRMqLee5LO7sEuGJzgj_fBx2M_3WKoMPTLSmeShuxj1pQAr_h36i9FBHJISKwhgZGdeJr5vPjxUVOWxysHaVZYcnj0JkzpLplQEET61gohSHoenvv18LZdf53E5Z-d5bkLgHRLYwaNJagElh1CwwMXPGIRZV6C7mKFhSHWCBEMTh2D_yancMok2vyN2kRBuIzDAkQJHFNaQYuAd0hC38rBqloZz46NE%3D).
---
|
---
[](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=2348789eb10d429eafb676ba49c94aac&_e=LKgSlECJgGs_otI5BWBC6qbLn6LPpRA51taK7aU1NcNESPTNEFqc9HkPHS-aDUI5CqOrH1SmXwSeQW68OeW3UhAvLsYBAiwCSnJg_Q1_30CJ2IfiezH0JPvMn-vtsDxfccOhmD0jTuuq4CDiLN4LgxItM4Zy8w5xx6nVNYfbZ1v7MhCXKTF_mtKTs3Tsfyr3CwJx-8yXemTTEvMjt6cYgP7abhJ41ho5Ky8eF_mmCTiJ6q1LNGWKpHzHQ4AL3LTG-5FG8QJ981EjuOYU1Zw6isG622pII5doVTk-ZDxgP_k%3D)
---
|
---
Throughout the day today, we have seen an increasing number of journalists asking House members about what I proposed and I believe that it is helping people understand that there is a better way forward. **Too many in Washington today think that even talking to someone from the opposite party, let alone daring to work with them on something, means that you’re losing**. That is ridiculous, and we need more voices out there putting pressure on them to change their misguided ways. Having served in Congress for 18 years, and chairing the House Budget Committee that worked with a Democratic president to balance our nation’s balanced budget for the first time in decades. I truly believe that we can find ways to have bipartisan collaboration and have some honest political give and take on key issues that face the American people.
---
---
If there was one thing that was made clear by voters in the most recent election, it’s that they want their elected leaders to have ideas and work together. Those who continue to play politics and fail to offer workable policy ideas are failing in their duty to the American people. **As you can see, my voice is out there and I’m going to keep putting pressure on my Republican Party to end this toxic division and get to work**. Any funds that we’re able to [raise online right now](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=2348789eb10d429eafb676ba49c94aac&_e=LKgSlECJgGs_otI5BWBC6hxW1vyIdke_kMGOZH8jEd1NiFsaoAUXt8gj3VeBaCV-251wICKYiAV20gCsv1ZWE2XDb0QUwSe5nJQGu4j-8QmnWO8lg1g40dFm2w4MKmmZ0bbCl9wsWsmvLYVULlkFRH8wiinp0zA-cwR0h-BwwsHe4XGqVO0J8YSuFm7-tIwj2cJKvYvl4wUWO_dX_1ArYA%3D%3D) will help in this effort. [**If you’d like to chip in right now to help, you can use this link to make a secure online donation**](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=2348789eb10d429eafb676ba49c94aac&_e=LKgSlECJgGs_otI5BWBC6hxW1vyIdke_kMGOZH8jEd1NiFsaoAUXt8gj3VeBaCV-fq55nmGyIOTzKmCR8urLCtJ3JT6o_hNW7SydMqByDlCVhYYbXCXyjTj9n4WJVeG0TfmFVZ7hbvCJftik4AY-y272GKX64Ur25-wLj9m-yCy0XIjAIJgbt8AahSJJl1zSQmOgiSxTaszYK9wB-uWfmQ%3D%3D). I’d very much appreciate your support. Thank you for all that you are doing to heal America. -John

[Donate Now](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=2348789eb10d429eafb676ba49c94aac&_e=LKgSlECJgGs_otI5BWBC6hxW1vyIdke_kMGOZH8jEd1NiFsaoAUXt8gj3VeBaCV-er1xlAY2selIctzZjIpdT1hpR_-gZ30auZrSiPrpjzBXkRe2bGKlWZid24E_77zM_q4xeL_4gpbQoBOZlhjLZjuwQC17kFIMd2B1KNgU20bGbekhI1d4IIhNZbXoz0IFHn0BXkNmN89lJDZ4r3nUHw%3D%3D)

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: AIPAC, crypto, and billionaires
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

This last cycle, we faced an unprecedented wave of outside spending from
right-wing groups and Super PACs.

DMFI, AIPAC, crypto billionaires, the Mainstream Democrats PAC and others
spent millions of dollars in democratic primaries and directly against our
candidates. They wanted to squash our movement to transform the Democratic
Party and elect more leaders who aren’t afraid to speak out against the
status quo.

We operate on a shoestring budget, especially when compared to the impact
we’ve had over the last few years. But we’ve faced millions of dollars in
outside spending and our own fundraising has declined over the last year.

We can’t afford this decline in our fundraising numbers.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/124673?refcode=em20230104-26900&t=1001&akid=26900%2E1203867%2E-cKoW5 ]Peter, we need
your support to fight back against this massive outside spending and be
prepared for the same attacks this next year. Will you rush a
$3 contribution right now?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/124673?refcode=em20230104-26900&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=26900%2E1203867%2E-cKoW5 ]Contribute $3

We’re working every single day to find our next slate of candidates but we
also need to prepare for what’s to come after so much money was spent
against us this last cycle.

Donations from supporters like you will make all the difference for us and
our candidates when wealthy and far-right groups turn up the heat this
cycle. We need your help to overcome their corrupt influence and protect
our candidates.

With your help, we’ve already elected historic leaders and are building
the infrastructure to help grassroots candidates run, win, take office,
and start changing this country. Candidates who will go on to challenge
special interests, billionaires, and far-right policies.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/124673?refcode=em20230104-26900&t=1021&akid=26900%2E1203867%2E-cKoW5 ]And it’s all possible because of people like you chipping what you
can. So, Peter, will you support us for the first time so we can stay
strong against big money in politics?

Thank you,

Team JD

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1022&akid=26900%2E1203867%2E-cKoW5 ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1023&akid=26900%2E1203867%2E-cKoW5 ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20230104-26900-footer&t=1024&refcode2=26900_1203867_-cKoW5&akid=26900%2E1203867%2E-cKoW5

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1025&akid=26900%2E1203867%2E-cKoW5

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

Democrats are facing one of the toughest Senate maps in decades next cycle – defending 23 seats, compared to just 11 for Republicans. And friend, election experts are already calling me one of the most vulnerable Democrats on the ballot.
